2026-03-15T01:22:30.4581376Z     346. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

2026-03-15T01:22:30.4583231Z     349. static void ProcessFrame()
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4583621Z     350. {
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4583957Z     351.     ++g_logFrame;
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4584325Z     352. 
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4584715Z     353.     CPlayerPed* player = CWorld::Players[0].m_pPed;
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4585168Z     354.     if (!player) return;
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4585554Z     355. 
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4585897Z     356.     HandleKeys(player);
2026-03-15T01:22:30.4586278Z     357.

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2378182Z     95. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2378954Z     96. // FindNearestFreeCar

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2381705Z     100. // ESTRATEGIA DE SELECCAO (dois passes):

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2385994Z     105. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2386913Z     106. CVehicle* FindNearestFreeCar(CVector const& searchPos, CVehicle* excludePlayerCar)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2387719Z     107. {

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2388922Z     109.     float     bestSnappedD = FIND_CAR_RADIUS;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2389453Z     110. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2389841Z     111.     CVehicle* bestAny      = nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2390695Z     112.     float     bestAnyD     = FIND_CAR_RADIUS;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2391226Z     113. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2391689Z     114.     for (CVehicle* veh : *CPools::ms_pVehiclePool)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2392244Z     115.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2392671Z     116.         if (!veh)                        continue;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2393302Z     117.         if (veh == excludePlayerCar)     continue;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2393918Z     118.         if (veh->m_pDriver)              continue;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2394741Z     119.         if (veh->m_nVehicleSubClass > 2) continue;   // excluir avioes/helicopteros
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2395477Z     120. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2395955Z     121.         float d = Dist2D(veh->GetPosition(), searchPos);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2396521Z     122. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2396886Z     123.         // Passe "qualquer"
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2397373Z     124.         if (d < bestAnyD)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2397828Z     125.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2398215Z     126.             bestAnyD = d;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2398681Z     127.             bestAny  = veh;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2399136Z     128.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2399499Z     129. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2400146Z     130.         // Passe "snapped": linkId valido → carro ja no road-graph
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2401301Z     131.         unsigned linkId = (unsigned)veh->m_autoPilot.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2402267Z     132.         if (linkId <= MAX_VALID_LINK_ID && d < bestSnappedD)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2402863Z     133.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2403265Z     134.             bestSnappedD = d;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2403764Z     135.             bestSnapped  = veh;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2404235Z     136.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2404603Z     137.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2404958Z     138. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2405494Z     139.     // Preferir carro snapped; fallback para qualquer carro disponivel
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2406328Z     140.     CVehicle* best     = bestSnapped ? bestSnapped : bestAny;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2407096Z     141.     float     bestDist = bestSnapped ? bestSnappedD : bestAnyD;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2407728Z     142. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2408066Z     143.     if (best)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2408450Z     144.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2409151Z     145.         unsigned linkId = (unsigned)best->m_autoPilot.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2410511Z     146.         LogEvent("FindNearestFreeCar: veh=%p dist=%.1fm linkId=%u(%s) pos=(%.1f,%.1f,%.1f) %s",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2411423Z     147.             static_cast<void*>(best), bestDist,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2412117Z     148.             linkId, (linkId <= MAX_VALID_LINK_ID) ? "OK" : "INVALID",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2412978Z     149.             best->GetPosition().x, best->GetPosition().y, best->GetPosition().z,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2414192Z     150.             bestSnapped ? "(road-snapped preferido)" : "(sem carro snapped — qualquer aceite)");
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2415011Z     151.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2415357Z     152.     else
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2415731Z     153.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2416432Z     154.         LogWarn("FindNearestFreeCar: nenhum carro livre num raio de %.0fm", FIND_CAR_RADIUS);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2417238Z     155.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2417592Z     156. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2417947Z     157.     return best;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2418353Z     158. }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2418695Z     159. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2419341Z     160. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2420381Z     161. // SetupDriveMode
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2421039Z     162. // Configura o CAutoPilot do carro do recruta para o modo escolhido.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2422131Z     163. // Chamado uma vez ao mudar de modo (KEY 4) ou ao transitar para DRIVING.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2422850Z     164. //
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2423416Z     165. // IMPORTANTE: JoinCarWithRoadSystem e o passo critico que snap ao
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2424296Z     166. // road-graph. Sem este passo o NPC pode navegar fora da estrada.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2425168Z     167. // Equivalente ao opcode CLEO 06E1 que chama esta funcao internamente.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2426182Z     168. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2426955Z     169. void SetupDriveMode(CPlayerPed* player, DriveMode mode)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2427588Z     170. {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2428049Z     171.     if (!IsCarValid() || !IsRecruitValid()) return;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2428632Z     172. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2429031Z     173.     CVehicle*   recruitCar = g_car;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2429650Z     174.     CAutoPilot& ap         = recruitCar->m_autoPilot;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2430724Z     175.     CVehicle*   playerCar  = player->bInVehicle ? player->m_pVehicle : nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2431462Z     176. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2431831Z     177.     switch (mode)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2432244Z     178.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2432938Z     179.     // ── CIVICO-D: EscortRearFaraway ─────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2433734Z     180.     // Usa road-graph identico ao NPC de escolta vanilla.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2434436Z     181.     // m_pTargetCar aponta para o carro do jogador.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2435219Z     182.     // NOTA: ProcessDrivingAI pode baixar para MISSION_34 a curta distancia.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2435971Z     183.     case DriveMode::CIVICO_D:
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2436435Z     184.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2436806Z     185.         if (!playerCar)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2437258Z     186.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2437992Z     187.             LogDrive("SetupDriveMode: CIVICO_D sem carro jogador -> fallback DIRETO");
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2438903Z     188.             SetupDriveMode(player, DriveMode::DIRETO);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2439496Z     189.             return;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2439922Z     190.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2440628Z     191.         ap.m_nCarMission      = MISSION_43;  // EscortRearFaraway (=67)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2441339Z     192.         ap.m_pTargetCar       = playerCar;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2441948Z     193.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed     = SPEED_CIVICO;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2442602Z     194.         ap.m_nCarDrivingStyle = DRIVINGSTYLE_STOP_FOR_CARS;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2443183Z     195.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2443822Z     196.             unsigned linkPre  = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2444810Z     197.             unsigned areaPre  = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nAreaId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2445670Z     198.             float    headPre  = recruitCar->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2446370Z     199.             float    playerH  = playerCar->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2447089Z     200.             CCarCtrl::JoinCarWithRoadSystem(recruitCar);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2447975Z     201.             g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;   // reset snap timer apos JoinRoad no SetupDriveMode
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2449057Z     202.             unsigned linkPost = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2450059Z     203.             unsigned areaPost = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nAreaId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2451409Z     204.             float    headPost = recruitCar->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2452287Z     205.             LogDrive("SetupDriveMode: CIVICO_D mission=43 speed=%d driveStyle=STOP_FOR_CARS playerCar=%p "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2453281Z     206.                      "JOIN_ROAD: linkId %u->%u areaId %u->%u heading_pre=%.3f heading_post=%.3f lane=%d "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2454265Z     207.                      "playerHeading=%.3f (%s)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2454888Z     208.                 (int)ap.m_nCruiseSpeed, static_cast<void*>(playerCar),
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2455686Z     209.                 linkPre, linkPost, areaPre, areaPost,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2456292Z     210.                 headPre, headPost, (int)ap.m_nCurrentLane,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2456845Z     211.                 playerH,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2457548Z     212.                 (linkPre == linkPost ? "ATENCAO: linkId nao mudou apos JoinRoad!" : "JoinRoad OK snap"));
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2458272Z     213.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2458630Z     214.         break;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2458979Z     215.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2459300Z     216. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2459848Z     217.     // ── CIVICO-E: FollowCarFaraway ──────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2460537Z     218.     case DriveMode::CIVICO_E:
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2460920Z     219.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2461261Z     220.         if (!playerCar)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2461637Z     221.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2462141Z     222.             LogDrive("SetupDriveMode: CIVICO_E sem carro jogador -> fallback DIRETO");
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2462775Z     223.             SetupDriveMode(player, DriveMode::DIRETO);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2463223Z     224.             return;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2463572Z     225.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2463992Z     226.         ap.m_nCarMission      = MISSION_34;  // FollowCarFaraway (=52)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2464526Z     227.         ap.m_pTargetCar       = playerCar;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2464979Z     228.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed     = SPEED_CIVICO;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2465460Z     229.         ap.m_nCarDrivingStyle = DRIVINGSTYLE_STOP_FOR_CARS;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2465916Z     230.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2466402Z     231.             unsigned linkPre  = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2467079Z     232.             unsigned areaPre  = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nAreaId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2467679Z     233.             float    headPre  = recruitCar->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2468182Z     234.             float    playerH  = playerCar->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2468692Z     235.             CCarCtrl::JoinCarWithRoadSystem(recruitCar);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2469169Z     236.             g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2469689Z     237.             unsigned linkPost = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2470434Z     238.             unsigned areaPost = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nAreaId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2470980Z     239.             float    headPost = recruitCar->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2471605Z     240.             LogDrive("SetupDriveMode: CIVICO_E mission=34 speed=%d driveStyle=STOP_FOR_CARS playerCar=%p "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2472354Z     241.                      "JOIN_ROAD: linkId %u->%u areaId %u->%u heading_pre=%.3f heading_post=%.3f lane=%d "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2472922Z     242.                      "playerHeading=%.3f (%s)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2473389Z     243.                 (int)ap.m_nCruiseSpeed, static_cast<void*>(playerCar),
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2473887Z     244.                 linkPre, linkPost, areaPre, areaPost,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2474353Z     245.                 headPre, headPost, (int)ap.m_nCurrentLane,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2474775Z     246.                 playerH,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2475315Z     247.                 (linkPre == linkPost ? "ATENCAO: linkId nao mudou apos JoinRoad!" : "JoinRoad OK snap"));
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2475864Z     248.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2476209Z     249.         break;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2476542Z     250.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2476854Z     251. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2477320Z     252.     // ── DIRETO: GotoCoords ─────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2477781Z     253.     case DriveMode::DIRETO:
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2478146Z     254.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2478639Z     255.         CVector dest          = player->GetPosition();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2479126Z     256.         ap.m_nCarMission      = MISSION_GOTOCOORDS;  // =8
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2479706Z     257.         ap.m_pTargetCar       = nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2480133Z     258.         ap.m_vecDestinationCoors = dest;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2480672Z     259.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed     = SPEED_DIRETO;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2481277Z     260.         ap.m_nCarDrivingStyle = DRIVINGSTYLE_PLOUGH_THROUGH;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2481898Z     261.         LogDrive("SetupDriveMode: DIRETO mission=8 speed=%d dest=(%.1f,%.1f,%.1f)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2482808Z     262.             (int)ap.m_nCruiseSpeed, dest.x, dest.y, dest.z);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2483339Z     263.         break;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2495094Z     264.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2495460Z     265. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2495981Z     266.     // ── PARADO: StopForever ────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2496504Z     267.     case DriveMode::PARADO:
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2496873Z     268.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2497265Z     269.         ap.m_nCarMission      = MISSION_STOP_FOREVER;  // =11
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2497752Z     270.         ap.m_pTargetCar       = nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2498162Z     271.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed     = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2498598Z     272.         ap.m_nCarDrivingStyle = DRIVINGSTYLE_STOP_FOR_CARS;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2499117Z     273.         LogDrive("SetupDriveMode: PARADO mission=11 speed=0");
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2499568Z     274.         break;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2499911Z     275.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2500357Z     276. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2500677Z     277.     default:
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2501095Z     278.         LogWarn("SetupDriveMode: modo desconhecido %d", (int)mode);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2501558Z     279.         break;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2501875Z     280.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2502191Z     281. }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2502493Z     282. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2502952Z     283. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2503398Z     284. // ProcessDrivingAI
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2503857Z     285. // Per-frame: zonas STOP/SLOW, offroad, recovery, speed adaptativa,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2504438Z     286. // auto-degrade CIVICO_D, periodic road snap, dump AI throttled.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2505034Z     287. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2505534Z     288. void ProcessDrivingAI(CPlayerPed* player)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2505938Z     289. {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2506259Z     290.     if (!IsCarValid()) return;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2506621Z     291. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2506934Z     292.     CVehicle*   veh       = g_car;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2507347Z     293.     CAutoPilot& ap        = veh->m_autoPilot;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2507796Z     294.     CVector     vPos      = veh->GetPosition();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2508243Z     295.     CVector     playerPos = player->GetPosition();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2508905Z     296.     float       dist      = Dist2D(vPos, playerPos);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2509314Z     297. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2509775Z     298.     // ── ZONA STOP: recruta completamente parado ──────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2510483Z     299.     if (dist < STOP_ZONE_M)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2510857Z     300.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2511185Z     301.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2511585Z     302.         ap.m_nCarMission  = MISSION_STOP_FOREVER;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2511997Z     303.         return;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2512338Z     304.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2512659Z     305. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2513123Z     306.     // ── ZONA SLOW: recruta abranda + restaura missao CIVICO ──────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2513668Z     307.     // A STOP zone pode ter sobrescrito mission=STOP_FOREVER(11).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2514203Z     308.     // A SLOW zone restaura a missao CIVICO para que o road-follow
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2514754Z     309.     // retome assim que o carro sair da zona (dist > SLOW_ZONE_M).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2515246Z     310.     if (dist < SLOW_ZONE_M)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2515610Z     311.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2515961Z     312.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed = SPEED_SLOW;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2516390Z     313.         if (IsCivicoMode(g_driveMode))
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2516775Z     314.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2517192Z     315.             eCarMission expectedM = GetExpectedMission(g_driveMode);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2517696Z     316.             if (ap.m_nCarMission != expectedM)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2518086Z     317.             {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2518529Z     318.                 CVehicle* pCar = player->bInVehicle ? player->m_pVehicle : nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2519050Z     319.                 if (!g_slowZoneRestoring)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2519442Z     320.                 {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2519891Z     321.                     LogDrive("SLOW_ZONE: dist=%.1fm missao_atual=%d->%s restaurada "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2520598Z     322.                              "speed=%d targetCar=%s (road-follow retomara ao sair da zona)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2521130Z     323.                         dist, (int)ap.m_nCarMission,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2521713Z     324.                         (expectedM == MISSION_43) ? "MISSION_43(EscortRear)" : "MISSION_34(FollowFaraway)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2522275Z     325.                         (int)SPEED_SLOW,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2522697Z     326.                         pCar ? "valido" : "nullptr(pe)");
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2523148Z     327.                     g_slowZoneRestoring = true;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2523552Z     328.                 }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2523924Z     329.                 ap.m_nCarMission = expectedM;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2524364Z     330.                 if (pCar) ap.m_pTargetCar = pCar;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2524761Z     331.             }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2525091Z     332.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2525416Z     333.         return;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2525746Z     334.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2526064Z     335. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2526458Z     336.     // Saiu da SLOW_ZONE (dist >= SLOW_ZONE_M): road-follow retomado.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2527022Z     337.     // NOTA: o re-snap via JoinCarWithRoadSystem foi REMOVIDO daqui porque
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2527645Z     338.     // produzia linkId invalido (0xFFFFFE1E) quando o carro estava numa posicao
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2528332Z     339.     // critica (interseccao, passeio, etc.) → activava o guard INVALID_LINK →
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2528900Z     340.     // recruta beelining no passeio por ate ~28 segundos.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2529450Z     341.     // O snap periodico (ROAD_SNAP_INTERVAL=300fr) e suficiente para re-alinhar.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2529971Z     342.     if (g_slowZoneRestoring)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2530563Z     343.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2530919Z     344.         g_slowZoneRestoring = false;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2531581Z     345.         LogDrive("SLOW_ZONE: saiu (dist=%.1fm) — road-follow retomado (snap periodico em %d frames)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2532344Z     346.             dist, ROAD_SNAP_INTERVAL - g_civicRoadSnapTimer);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2532782Z     347.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2533091Z     348. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2533647Z     349.     // ── Verificacao de offroad (throttled) ───────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2534128Z     350.     if (g_offroadTimer <= 0)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2534495Z     351.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2534841Z     352.         bool wasOffroad = g_isOffroad;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2535262Z     353.         g_isOffroad     = DetectOffroad(veh);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2535683Z     354.         g_offroadTimer  = OFFROAD_CHECK_INTERVAL;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2536106Z     355.         if (g_isOffroad != wasOffroad)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2536490Z     356.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2536853Z     357.             LogDrive("Offroad: %s -> %s (modo=%s)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2537290Z     358.                 wasOffroad ? "SIM" : "NAO",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2537700Z     359.                 g_isOffroad  ? "SIM" : "NAO",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2538122Z     360.                 DriveModeName(g_driveMode));
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2538610Z     361.             // Ao entrar em offroad em modo CIVICO: snap imediato ao road-graph
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2539188Z     362.             // para tentar re-alinhar com a estrada (sem beelining).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2539685Z     363.             if (g_isOffroad && IsCivicoMode(g_driveMode))
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2540101Z     364.             {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2540612Z     365.                 CCarCtrl::JoinCarWithRoadSystem(veh);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2541054Z     366.                 g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2541769Z     367.                 LogDrive("OFFROAD_ENTER_SNAP: JoinCarWithRoadSystem ao detectar offroad (CIVICO — sem beelining)");
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2542386Z     368.             }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2542706Z     369.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2543028Z     370.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2543346Z     371.     else
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2543665Z     372.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2544000Z     373.         --g_offroadTimer;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2544363Z     374.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2544675Z     375. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2545148Z     376.     // ── Offroad + CIVICO: impedir snap periodico extra, sem beelining ─
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2545725Z     377.     // Em CIVICO o recruta deve seguir pela estrada mesmo quando offroad.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2546282Z     378.     // GOTOCOORDS+PLOUGH_THROUGH (beelining) e apenas para DIRETO.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2546856Z     379.     // Mantemos g_civicRoadSnapTimer=0 para forcar re-snap ao sair de offroad.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2547402Z     380.     if (g_isOffroad && IsCivicoMode(g_driveMode))
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2547815Z     381.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2548151Z     382.         g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2548528Z     383.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2548840Z     384. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2549290Z     385.     // ── Modo DIRETO: actualizar destino periodicamente ───────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2549787Z     386.     if (g_driveMode == DriveMode::DIRETO)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2550372Z     387.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2550728Z     388.         if (g_diretoTimer <= 0)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2551073Z     389.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2551449Z     390.             ap.m_vecDestinationCoors = playerPos;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2551901Z     391.             g_diretoTimer = DIRETO_UPDATE_INTERVAL;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2552317Z     392.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2552633Z     393.         else
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2552963Z     394.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2553297Z     395.             --g_diretoTimer;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2553666Z     396.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2554024Z     397.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed     = SPEED_DIRETO;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2554485Z     398.         ap.m_nCarDrivingStyle = DRIVINGSTYLE_PLOUGH_THROUGH;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2555060Z     399.         // Re-impor GOTOCOORDS por frame: o jogo pode sobrescrever para STOP_FOREVER
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2555606Z     400.         ap.m_nCarMission = MISSION_GOTOCOORDS;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2556148Z     401.         return;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2556480Z     402.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2556789Z     403.

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2558389Z     406.         return;

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2561237Z     411. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2561770Z     412.     // Garantir driveStyle correcto em CIVICO (STOP_FOR_CARS = respeita transito).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2562331Z     413.     ap.m_nCarDrivingStyle = DRIVINGSTYLE_STOP_FOR_CARS;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2562771Z     414. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2563243Z     415.     // ── Guard: link ID invalido ──────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2563809Z     416.     // JoinCarWithRoadSystem pode produzir linkId=0xFFFFFE1E (visto em log).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2564517Z     417.     // Com link invalido, ClipTargetOrientationToLink devolve lixo → WRONG_DIR.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2565216Z     418.     // ANTERIOR: fallback para GOTOCOORDS+PLOUGH_THROUGH (beelining) — REMOVIDO.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2565824Z     419.     //   Causa: recruta sobe passeios e conduz na faixa errada durante ~28s.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2566393Z     420.     // FIX: ao detectar link invalido, tentar re-snap imediato UMA VEZ.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2566921Z     421.     //   Se re-snap corrigir: continua CIVICO normalmente.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2567448Z     422.     //   Se re-snap falhar: manter missao CIVICO com velocidade reduzida
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2568044Z     423.     //     (sem beelining); snap periodico vai tentar corrigir nos proximos 5s.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2568549Z     424.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2568993Z     425.         unsigned linkId = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2569525Z     426.         if (linkId > MAX_VALID_LINK_ID)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2569917Z     427.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2570427Z     428.             if (!g_wasInvalidLink)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2570862Z     429.             {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2571231Z     430.                 g_wasInvalidLink = true;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2571881Z     431.                 LogDrive("INVALID_LINK: linkId=%u (invalido! MAX=%u) — re-snap imediato (sem beelining)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2572467Z     432.                     linkId, MAX_VALID_LINK_ID);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2572920Z     433.                 CCarCtrl::JoinCarWithRoadSystem(veh);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2573372Z     434.                 g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2573854Z     435.                 linkId = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2574375Z     436.                 if (linkId <= MAX_VALID_LINK_ID)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2574776Z     437.                 {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2575303Z     438.                     LogDrive("INVALID_LINK: re-snap corrigiu -> linkId=%u, CIVICO restaurado", linkId);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2575883Z     439.                     g_wasInvalidLink = false;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2576333Z     440.                     // fall through to normal CIVICO processing
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2576763Z     441.                 }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2577099Z     442.                 else
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2577438Z     443.                 {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2577874Z     444.                     LogDrive("INVALID_LINK: re-snap ainda invalido -> linkId=%u, "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2578457Z     445.                              "CIVICO reduzido (snap periodico vai corrigir)", linkId);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2578937Z     446.                 }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2579265Z     447.             }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2579770Z     448.             if (g_wasInvalidLink)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2580144Z     449.             {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2580747Z     450.                 // Ainda invalido: reduzir velocidade mas manter CIVICO (sem beelining).

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2582051Z     452.                 ap.m_nCruiseSpeed = SPEED_SLOW;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2582566Z     453.                 // Nao usar return aqui: deixar o snap periodico correr neste frame.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2583057Z     454.             }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2583385Z     455.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2583727Z     456.         else if (g_wasInvalidLink)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2584093Z     457.         {

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2585309Z     459.                 linkId);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2585684Z     460.             g_wasInvalidLink = false;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2586109Z     461.             CCarCtrl::JoinCarWithRoadSystem(veh);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2586540Z     462.             g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2586918Z     463.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2587231Z     464.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2587544Z     465. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2588001Z     466.     // ── Recuperacao de MISSION_STOP_FOREVER inesperado ───────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2588521Z     467.     // APENAS MISSION_STOP_FOREVER(11) e recuperado.

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2590329Z     470.     {

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2594756Z     478.                 playerCar ? "valido" : "nullptr(pe)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2595200Z     479.                 DriveModeName(g_driveMode));
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2595645Z     480.             ap.m_nCarMission      = expectedMission;

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2597047Z     483.             g_missionRecoveryTimer = 30;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2597441Z     484.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2597758Z     485.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2598074Z     486. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2598463Z     487.     // Speed adaptativa + alinhamento de faixa (para logging).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2598996Z     488.     // Quando link invalido: usar SPEED_SLOW como base para evitar que
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2599602Z     489.     // straightLineDistance corrompido (= mult=1.0) cause excesso de velocidade
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2600325Z     490.     // em curvas (causa confirmada de "recruta rapido demais e nao faz a curva").
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2601002Z     491.     ap.m_nCruiseSpeed = AdaptiveSpeed(veh, g_wasInvalidLink ? SPEED_SLOW : SPEED_CIVICO);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2601606Z     492.     float targetHeading = ApplyLaneAlignment(veh);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2602119Z     493. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2609250Z     494.     // Re-sincronizar target car se jogador mudou de veiculo
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2610562Z     495.     CVehicle* playerCar = player->bInVehicle ? player->m_pVehicle : nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2611286Z     496.     if (playerCar && ap.m_pTargetCar != playerCar)

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2615547Z     503.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2615877Z     504. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2616583Z     505.     // ── CIVICO_D auto-degrade: MISSION_43 → MISSION_34 a curta distancia ──
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2617421Z     506.     // MISSION_43 (EscortRearFaraway) tem comportamento "chase" ao virar
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2618312Z     507.     // bruscamente a curta distancia: copia o heading do jogador frame a frame.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2619213Z     508.     // MISSION_34 (FollowCarFaraway) e menos agressivo nessa situacao.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2620020Z     509.     // Abaixo de MEDIUM_DIST_M (25m): baixar para MISSION_34.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2620912Z     510.     // Acima de MEDIUM_DIST_M:        restaurar MISSION_43.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2621670Z     511.     // NOTA: MISSION_RECOVERY ja tratou STOP_FOREVER acima; aqui apenas
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2622554Z     512.     // alternamos entre MISSION_43 e MISSION_34 (ambas validas para CIVICO).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2623557Z     513.     if (g_driveMode == DriveMode::CIVICO_D && playerCar)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2624082Z     514.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2624519Z     515.         eCarMission idealMission = (dist < MEDIUM_DIST_M) ? MISSION_34 : MISSION_43;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2625071Z     516.         if (ap.m_nCarMission != idealMission)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2625472Z     517.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2625881Z     518.             // So altera se a missao actual e uma das duas CIVICO validas
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2626503Z     519.             // (nao interfere com estados intermédios 31/53 do road-SM)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2627065Z     520.             if (ap.m_nCarMission == MISSION_43 || ap.m_nCarMission == MISSION_34)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2627547Z     521.             {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2627993Z     522.                 LogDrive("CIVICO_D: dist=%.1fm auto-%s %s -> %s (MEDIUM_DIST=%.0fm)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2628491Z     523.                     dist,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2629023Z     524.                     (dist < MEDIUM_DIST_M) ? "degrade(perto:menos_chase)" : "restore(longe:road_follow)",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2629661Z     525.                     (ap.m_nCarMission == MISSION_43) ? "MISSION_43" : "MISSION_34",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2630419Z     526.                     (idealMission    == MISSION_43) ? "MISSION_43" : "MISSION_34",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2630930Z     527.                     MEDIUM_DIST_M);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2631348Z     528.                 ap.m_nCarMission = idealMission;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2631774Z     529.                 ap.m_pTargetCar  = playerCar;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2632161Z     530.             }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2632486Z     531.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2632805Z     532.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2633107Z     533. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2633592Z     534.     // ── Periodic road snap: JoinCarWithRoadSystem a cada ~5s ─────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2634146Z     535.     // Re-snap periodico para manter o veiculo alinhado com os nos
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2634655Z     536.     // de estrada e reduzir desvios de faixa acumulados.
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2635133Z     537.     // Apenas em modos CIVICO e em estrada (nao offroad).
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2635601Z     538.     if (IsCivicoMode(g_driveMode) && !g_isOffroad)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2636002Z     539.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2636372Z     540.         if (++g_civicRoadSnapTimer >= ROAD_SNAP_INTERVAL)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2636792Z     541.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2637296Z     542.             g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2637833Z     543.             unsigned linkBefore = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2638522Z     544.             CCarCtrl::JoinCarWithRoadSystem(veh);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2639074Z     545.             unsigned linkAfter = (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId;

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2641653Z     550.     else

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2643276Z     554.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2643593Z     555. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2644050Z     556.     // ── Deteccao de WRONG_DIR por transicao (nao throttled) ──────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2644492Z     557.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2644840Z     558.         float vH    = veh->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2645256Z     559.         float tH    = targetHeading;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2645655Z     560.         float dH    = tH - vH;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2646063Z     561.         while (dH >  3.14159f) dH -= 6.28318f;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2646491Z     562.         while (dH < -3.14159f) dH += 6.28318f;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2646900Z     563.         float absDH = dH < 0.0f ? -dH : dH;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2647347Z     564.         bool isWrong = (absDH > WRONG_DIR_THRESHOLD_RAD);
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2647799Z     565.         if (isWrong != g_wasWrongDir)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2648183Z     566.         {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2648609Z     567.             float physSpeedWD = veh->m_vecMoveSpeed.Magnitude() * 180.0f;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2649107Z     568.             if (isWrong)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2649624Z     569.                 LogDrive("WRONG_DIR_START: heading=%.3f targetH=%.3f deltaH=%.3f physSpeed=%.0fkmh "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2650392Z     570.                          "modo=%s mission=%d linkId=%u areaId=%u lane=%d straightLine=%d",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2651057Z     571.                     vH, tH, dH, physSpeedWD,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2651490Z     572.                     DriveModeName(g_driveMode),

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2654232Z     578.             else
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2654730Z     579.                 LogDrive("WRONG_DIR_END:   heading=%.3f targetH=%.3f deltaH=%.3f physSpeed=%.0fkmh "
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2655338Z     580.                          "modo=%s mission=%d linkId=%u areaId=%u lane=%d",
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2655793Z     581.                     vH, tH, dH, physSpeedWD,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2656209Z     582.                     DriveModeName(g_driveMode),
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2656637Z     583.                     (int)ap.m_nCarMission,
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2657104Z     584.                     (unsigned)ap.m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo.m_nCarPathLinkId,

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2658081Z     586.                     (int)ap.m_nCurrentLane);

2026-03-15T01:22:33.2658866Z     588.         }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2659186Z     589.     }
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2659637Z     590. 
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2660106Z     591.     // ── Dump AI throttled a cada ~2s (120 frames) ──────────────
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2660697Z     592.     if (++g_logAiFrame >= 120)
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2661066Z     593.     {
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2661503Z     594.         g_logAiFrame = 0;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2661894Z     595.         float vehHeading = veh->GetHeading();
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2662342Z     596.         float deltaH     = targetHeading - vehHeading;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2662812Z     597.         while (deltaH >  3.14159f) deltaH -= 6.28318f;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2663256Z     598.         while (deltaH < -3.14159f) deltaH += 6.28318f;
2026-03-15T01:22:33.2663730Z     599.         float absDeltaH = deltaH < 0.0f ? -deltaH : deltaH;

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0126189Z #### **grove_recruit_ai.cpp** (219 lines)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0126546Z **On-foot follow AI - Task management and follow confirmation**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0126813Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0126906Z **Critical Mechanisms:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0127048Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0127177Z 1. **TASK_CHANGE Real-Time Tracking (Lines 38-67)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0127684Z    - Logs transitions like: 203→1207 (follow accepted), 1207→203 (follow canceled)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0128140Z    - Detects GANG_SPAWN_AI_END: when task 400 terminates
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0128760Z    - Calls `ClearTaskEventResponse()` to clear slot[1]/[2] and re-emit follow
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0129060Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0129361Z 2. **POST_FOLLOW_CHECK - 3-Frame Deferred Verification (Lines 69-132)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0130020Z    - **Why deferred?** `CreateFirstSubTask()` is called by TaskManager in the NEXT frame after `TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0130932Z    - Confirms if task became 1207 (GANG_FOLLOWER) or 1500 (GANG_FOLLOWER_ALT)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0131519Z    - If NOT confirmed: fallback via `GroupIntelSetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(4)` = FollowLeaderAnyMeans
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0132093Z    - Retries up to `MAX_FOLLOW_FALLBACK_RETRIES=5` to avoid infinite loops
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0132368Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0132538Z 3. **GROUP_RESCAN_INTERVAL - Periodic Validation (Lines 135-173)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0132942Z    - Every 120 frames (~2s): verify recruit is still in group
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0133354Z    - Detects native dismiss (when native recruit button removes ped)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0133722Z    - Dumps task state and group membership
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0133908Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0134060Z 4. **Initial Follow Burst + Passive Mode (Lines 175-196)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0134494Z    - First 300 frames after spawn: re-emit follow every 18 frames (aggressive burst)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0134999Z    - Passive mode (!g_aggressive): continuous re-emit of follow every 18 frames
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0135493Z    - Ensures robust follow establishment even if initial task assignment fails
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0135792Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0135902Z 5. **Throttled AI Dump - ~2s (Lines 198-217)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0136272Z    - Logs distance, positions, timers, pedType, respect, all task slots
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0136546Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0136622Z ---

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0137501Z

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0137711Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0137808Z 1. **DetectOffroad() (Lines 32-48)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0138199Z    - Uses `CCarCtrl::FindNodesThisCarIsNearestTo()` to find nearest road node
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0138602Z    - Returns true if distance > 28m from node
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0138792Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0138882Z 2. **AdaptiveSpeed() (Lines 55-63)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0139281Z    - Multiplier based on curve angle via `FindSpeedMultiplierWithSpeedFromNodes()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0139764Z    - Reduces speed on sharp turns, maintains speed on straights
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0140013Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0140120Z 3. **ApplyLaneAlignment() (Lines 70-93)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0140679Z    - Calls `ClipTargetOrientationToLink()` to get road-aligned heading
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0141085Z    - Used only for logging (steering not altered)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0141298Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0141400Z 4. **FindNearestFreeCar() (Lines 106-158)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0141680Z    - **Two-pass strategy:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0142006Z      - Pass 1: Prefer cars already snapped to road-graph (valid linkId)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0142421Z      - Pass 2: Accept any free car if no snapped cars found
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0142930Z    - Excludes player car, aviões/helicopteros, cars with drivers
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0143181Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0143282Z 5. **SetupDriveMode() (Lines 169-281)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0143566Z    - Configures CAutoPilot for 4 modes:
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0143929Z      - **CIVICO_D**: MISSION_43 (EscortRearFaraway) + JoinCarWithRoadSystem
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0144381Z      - **CIVICO_E**: MISSION_34 (FollowCarFaraway) + JoinCarWithRoadSystem
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0144833Z      - **DIRETO**: MISSION_GOTOCOORDS + PLOUGH_THROUGH (straight line)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0145280Z      - **PARADO**: MISSION_STOP_FOREVER + speed=0
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0145546Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0145910Z 6. **ProcessDrivingAI() (Lines 288-629)** - **Most Complex**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0146292Z    - **STOP_ZONE** (dist < 6m): Complete halt
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0146650Z    - **SLOW_ZONE** (dist < 10m): Reduce speed, restore CIVICO mission
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0147241Z    - **Offroad Detection** (throttled): Auto-snap to road on offroad entry (CIVICO modes)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0147981Z    
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0148287Z    **INVALID_LINK Guard (Lines 424-464):**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0148746Z    - Detects linkId > 50000 (invalid)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0149381Z    - **First occurrence**: Re-snap immediately via `JoinCarWithRoadSystem()` once
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0150515Z    - **If still invalid**: Reduce speed to SPEED_SLOW, maintain CIVICO (NO beelining)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0151253Z    - Periodic snap (5s) will correct in next window
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0151718Z    
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0152042Z    **CIVICO_D Auto-Degrade (Lines 513-532)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0152623Z    - Dist < 25m: Use MISSION_34 (less "chase" behavior on sharp turns)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0153403Z    - Dist ≥ 25m: Use MISSION_43 (normal road-following)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0153880Z    
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0154178Z    **Periodic Road Snap (Lines 540-549)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0154808Z    - Every 300 frames (~5s): `JoinCarWithRoadSystem()` to maintain alignment
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0155452Z    - Only in CIVICO modes and when on-road
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0155871Z    
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0156163Z    **MISSION_RECOVERY (Lines 469-485)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0156817Z    - If MISSION_STOP_FOREVER detected outside STOP_ZONE: restore expected mission
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0157643Z    - Throttled: only checks every 30 frames when recoveryTimer expires
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0158107Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0158273Z 7. **ProcessEnterCar() (Lines 634-664)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0158759Z    - Waits for recruit to enter car (6s timeout)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0159318Z    - Transitions to DRIVING and calls `SetupDriveMode()`

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0170366Z      - Pre-join diagnostics: checks if ped already in another gang group (GSF NPCs auto-grouped)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0170854Z      - Calls `MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0171309Z      - **Fallback if failed**: Use `AddFollower()` (slower, doesn't register in CPedGroupIntelligence)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0172017Z      - **Re-join mechanism**: If AddFollower used and later FindMaxGroupMembers() > 0, retry MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0172512Z    
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0172761Z    - **Step 3**: Set m_fMaxSeparation = 100.0f (separation distance)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0173078Z    
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0173317Z    - **Step 4**: Emit follow via TellGroupFollowWithRespect()

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0235219Z ### **KEY ARCHITECTURAL INSIGHTS**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0235384Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0235488Z #### **Problem: On-Foot Follow Issues**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0236067Z 1. **ClearTaskEventResponse()** fix (latest commit):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0236950Z    - GANG_SPAWN_COMPLEX(1219) persists in slot[2] after GANG_SPAWN_AI(400) ends
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0237452Z    - With bKeepTasksAfterCleanUp=1, this blocks GANG_FOLLOWER(1207) in slot[3]
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0238049Z    - `ClearTaskEventResponse()` empties slot[1]/[2], freeing slot[3]
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0238315Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0238467Z 2. **POST_FOLLOW_CHECK** (grove_recruit_ai.cpp, lines 69-132):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0238913Z    - Deferred 3 frames because TaskManager's CreateFirstSubTask() runs next frame
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0239405Z    - Confirms task became 1207/1500, else tries fallback SetAllocatorType(4)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0239799Z    - Retries limited to prevent infinite loops
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0239996Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0240433Z 3. **Respect Boost PERSISTENT** (grove_recruit_group.cpp, lines 44-70):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0241391Z    - Boost active entire session because FindMaxGroupMembers() is called periodically
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0241983Z    - Temporary boost would be lost before CreateFirstSubTask reads it
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0242254Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0242371Z #### **Problem: Driving Issues (CIVICO modes)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0242734Z 1. **INVALID_LINK Guard** (grove_recruit_drive.cpp, lines 424-464):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0243172Z    - JoinCarWithRoadSystem() can produce invalid linkId (0xFFFFFE1E)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0243768Z    - **Old fix** (broken): Fallback to GOTOCOORDS+PLOUGH_THROUGH → beelining on sidewalks
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0244386Z    - **New fix**: Re-snap once, if still invalid → reduce speed, maintain CIVICO, NO beelining
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0244830Z    - Periodic 5s snap will correct in next window
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0245192Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0245371Z 2. **Auto-Degrade CIVICO_D** (grove_recruit_drive.cpp, lines 513-532):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0245840Z    - MISSION_43 (EscortRearFaraway) has "chase" behavior on sharp close turns
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0246308Z    - Dist < 25m: switch to MISSION_34 (FollowCarFaraway) - less aggressive
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0246779Z    - Dist ≥ 25m: restore MISSION_43 (normal road-follow)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0246993Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0247167Z 3. **Periodic Road Snap** (grove_recruit_drive.cpp, lines 540-549):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0247589Z    - Every 5s: `JoinCarWithRoadSystem()` to maintain alignment
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0248093Z    - **OLD PROBLEM** (removed): SLOW_ZONE re-snap caused invalid linkId → beelining
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0248581Z    - **NEW**: Only periodic snap at fixed 5s interval (no event-triggered snaps)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0248874Z 
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0248962Z #### **Flow: Key Lifecycle**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0249186Z ```
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0249354Z KEY 1 (Recruit)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0249544Z   ↓
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0249767Z CPopulation::AddPed() → spawn ped
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0250014Z   ↓
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0250458Z ActivateRespectBoost() → boost to 1000.0f
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0250742Z   ↓
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0250955Z AddRecruitToGroup() → join to group
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0251323Z   ├─ Step 1: Set flags (bNeverLeaves, bKeepTasks, etc.)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0251750Z   ├─ Step 2: MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup() [or AddFollower fallback]
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0252138Z   ├─ Step 3: Set m_fMaxSeparation = 100.0f
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0252552Z   └─ Step 4: TellGroupFollowWithRespect() → arm POST_FOLLOW_CHECK
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0252882Z   ↓
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0253110Z g_state = ON_FOOT, g_initialFollowTimer = 300 (5s burst)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0253405Z   ↓
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0253577Z ProcessFrame() loop:
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0253816Z   ├─ ProcessOnFoot()
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0254085Z   │  ├─ TASK_CHANGE tracking (log transitions)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0254412Z   │  ├─ POST_FOLLOW_CHECK (3fr deferred)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0254707Z   │  ├─ GROUP_RESCAN (every 2s)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0255060Z   │  ├─ Initial burst (5s) + passive mode re-emit (every 300ms)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0255430Z   │  └─ Throttled dump (every 2s)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0255747Z   ├─ ProcessObserver() [always, for diagnostics]
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0256235Z   └─ HandleKeys()
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0256420Z ```
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0256508Z

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0299442Z     **Entry point and global state management**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0299708Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0299879Z     **Key Components:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0300282Z     - Global variable definitions for all timers, state, and flags
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0300698Z     - `HandleKeys()`: Interprets 6 keyboard commands (1/2/3/4/N/B)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0301159Z     - `ProcessFrame()`: Main dispatcher that routes to ProcessOnFoot/Driving/Passenger
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0301750Z     - Utility functions: `IsRecruitValid()`, `IsCarValid()`, `Dist2D()`, `ShowMsg()`, `KeyJustPressed()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0302196Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0302366Z     **State Machine:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0302656Z     - INACTIVE → ON_FOOT (recruit spawning)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0302963Z     - ON_FOOT ↔ ENTER_CAR ↔ DRIVING
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0303236Z     - DRIVING ↔ PASSENGER
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0303457Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0303627Z     **Keyboard Controls:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0303850Z     - **1**: Recruit/Dismiss
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0304084Z     - **2**: Enter/Exit Car (dual mode)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0304348Z     - **3**: Player as Passenger/Exit  
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0304727Z     - **4**: Cycle Drive Mode (CIVICO_D → CIVICO_E → DIRETO → PARADO)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0305064Z     - **N**: Toggle Aggressive Mode
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0305331Z     - **B**: Toggle Drive-by (Passenger only)

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0306101Z     #### **grove_recruit_ai.cpp** (219 lines)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0306441Z     **On-foot follow AI - Task management and follow confirmation**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0306774Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0306949Z     **Critical Mechanisms:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0307165Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0307395Z     1. **TASK_CHANGE Real-Time Tracking (Lines 38-67)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0307931Z        - Logs transitions like: 203→1207 (follow accepted), 1207→203 (follow canceled)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0308369Z        - Detects GANG_SPAWN_AI_END: when task 400 terminates
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0308797Z        - Calls `ClearTaskEventResponse()` to clear slot[1]/[2] and re-emit follow
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0309166Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0309433Z     2. **POST_FOLLOW_CHECK - 3-Frame Deferred Verification (Lines 69-132)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0310094Z        - **Why deferred?** `CreateFirstSubTask()` is called by TaskManager in the NEXT frame after `TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0311129Z        - Confirms if task became 1207 (GANG_FOLLOWER) or 1500 (GANG_FOLLOWER_ALT)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0311717Z        - If NOT confirmed: fallback via `GroupIntelSetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(4)` = FollowLeaderAnyMeans
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0312299Z        - Retries up to `MAX_FOLLOW_FALLBACK_RETRIES=5` to avoid infinite loops
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0312644Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0312915Z     3. **GROUP_RESCAN_INTERVAL - Periodic Validation (Lines 135-173)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0313321Z        - Every 120 frames (~2s): verify recruit is still in group
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0313726Z        - Detects native dismiss (when native recruit button removes ped)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0314096Z        - Dumps task state and group membership
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0314352Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0314581Z     4. **Initial Follow Burst + Passive Mode (Lines 175-196)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0315023Z        - First 300 frames after spawn: re-emit follow every 18 frames (aggressive burst)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0315541Z        - Passive mode (!g_aggressive): continuous re-emit of follow every 18 frames
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0316041Z        - Ensures robust follow establishment even if initial task assignment fails
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0316557Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0316759Z     5. **Throttled AI Dump - ~2s (Lines 198-217)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0317288Z        - Logs distance, positions, timers, pedType, respect, all task slots
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0317634Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0317796Z     ---

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0318151Z     #### **grove_recruit_drive.cpp** (721 lines)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0318539Z     **Driving AI - Road-graph navigation, mission management, adaptive control**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0318900Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0319068Z     **Core Functions:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0319269Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0319460Z     1. **DetectOffroad() (Lines 32-48)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0319850Z        - Uses `CCarCtrl::FindNodesThisCarIsNearestTo()` to find nearest road node
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0320389Z        - Returns true if distance > 28m from node
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0320665Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0320852Z     2. **AdaptiveSpeed() (Lines 55-63)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0321272Z        - Multiplier based on curve angle via `FindSpeedMultiplierWithSpeedFromNodes()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0321762Z        - Reduces speed on sharp turns, maintains speed on straights
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0322084Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0322278Z     3. **ApplyLaneAlignment() (Lines 70-93)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0322661Z        - Calls `ClipTargetOrientationToLink()` to get road-aligned heading
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0323065Z        - Used only for logging (steering not altered)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0323338Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0323535Z     4. **FindNearestFreeCar() (Lines 106-158)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0323817Z        - **Two-pass strategy:**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0324148Z          - Pass 1: Prefer cars already snapped to road-graph (valid linkId)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0324547Z          - Pass 2: Accept any free car if no snapped cars found
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0325026Z        - Excludes player car, aviões/helicopteros, cars with drivers
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0325359Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0325551Z     5. **SetupDriveMode() (Lines 169-281)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0325832Z        - Configures CAutoPilot for 4 modes:
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0326195Z          - **CIVICO_D**: MISSION_43 (EscortRearFaraway) + JoinCarWithRoadSystem
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0326652Z          - **CIVICO_E**: MISSION_34 (FollowCarFaraway) + JoinCarWithRoadSystem
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0327083Z          - **DIRETO**: MISSION_GOTOCOORDS + PLOUGH_THROUGH (straight line)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0327460Z          - **PARADO**: MISSION_STOP_FOREVER + speed=0
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0327731Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0327973Z     6. **ProcessDrivingAI() (Lines 288-629)** - **Most Complex**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0328326Z        - **STOP_ZONE** (dist < 6m): Complete halt
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0328674Z        - **SLOW_ZONE** (dist < 10m): Reduce speed, restore CIVICO mission
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0329162Z        - **Offroad Detection** (throttled): Auto-snap to road on offroad entry (CIVICO modes)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0329570Z        
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0329766Z        **INVALID_LINK Guard (Lines 424-464):**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0330040Z        - Detects linkId > 50000 (invalid)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0330524Z        - **First occurrence**: Re-snap immediately via `JoinCarWithRoadSystem()` once
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0331039Z        - **If still invalid**: Reduce speed to SPEED_SLOW, maintain CIVICO (NO beelining)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0331473Z        - Periodic snap (5s) will correct in next window
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0331753Z        
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0331952Z        **CIVICO_D Auto-Degrade (Lines 513-532)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0332308Z        - Dist < 25m: Use MISSION_34 (less "chase" behavior on sharp turns)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0332758Z        - Dist ≥ 25m: Use MISSION_43 (normal road-following)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0333046Z        
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0333240Z        **Periodic Road Snap (Lines 540-549)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0333608Z        - Every 300 frames (~5s): `JoinCarWithRoadSystem()` to maintain alignment
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0334129Z        - Only in CIVICO modes and when on-road
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0334385Z        
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0334570Z        **MISSION_RECOVERY (Lines 469-485)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0335066Z        - If MISSION_STOP_FOREVER detected outside STOP_ZONE: restore expected mission
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0335552Z        - Throttled: only checks every 30 frames when recoveryTimer expires
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0335895Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0336087Z     7. **ProcessEnterCar() (Lines 634-664)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0336384Z        - Waits for recruit to enter car (6s timeout)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0336726Z        - Transitions to DRIVING and calls `SetupDriveMode()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0337022Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0337207Z     8. **ProcessDriving() (Lines 669-706)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0337478Z        - Calls `ProcessDrivingAI()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0337848Z        - Detects if recruit exited car → transitions to ON_FOOT
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0338149Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0338339Z     9. **ProcessPassenger() (Lines 711-720)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0338774Z        - When player is passenger: still calls `ProcessDrivingAI()` to control recruit driving
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0339182Z

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0340741Z

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0341241Z        - Searches m_apMembers[0..6] in player's group
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0341553Z        - Returns slot index or -1 if not found
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0341804Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0342084Z     2. **ActivateRespectBoost()/DeactivateRespectBoost() (Lines 44-70)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0342471Z        - **PERSISTENT boost** (not temporary):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0342886Z          - Why? `CreateFirstSubTask()` is deferred (called next frame) and reads STAT_RESPECT
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0343400Z          - FindMaxNumberOfGroupMembers() validates slots based on respect
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0343999Z          - Boost active from spawn → dismiss to cover deferred task creation and periodic rescans
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0344498Z        - If current respect < 1000.0f: boost to 1000.0f, save original
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0344814Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0345041Z     3. **TellGroupFollowWithRespect() (Lines 77-100)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0345444Z        - Wrapper around `TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer()` with logging
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0345866Z        - **Crucially**: Arms POST_FOLLOW_CHECK timer = 3 frames
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0346276Z        - Called by: AddRecruitToGroup, ProcessOnFoot (burst + passive mode)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0346622Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0346862Z     4. **AddRecruitToGroup() (Lines 107-260)** - **Most Complex**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0347436Z        - **Step 1**: Set flags: bNeverLeavesGroup=1, bKeepTasksAfterCleanUp=1, bDoesntListenToPlayerGroupCommands=0
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0347946Z        
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0348125Z        - **Step 2**: Join to group
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0348554Z          - Pre-join diagnostics: checks if ped already in another gang group (GSF NPCs auto-grouped)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0349023Z          - Calls `MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup()`
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0349484Z          - **Fallback if failed**: Use `AddFollower()` (slower, doesn't register in CPedGroupIntelligence)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0350305Z          - **Re-join mechanism**: If AddFollower used and later FindMaxGroupMembers() > 0, retry MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0350970Z        
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0351224Z        - **Step 3**: Set m_fMaxSeparation = 100.0f (separation distance)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0351540Z        
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0351790Z        - **Step 4**: Emit follow via TellGroupFollowWithRespect()
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0352095Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0352304Z     5. **RemoveRecruitFromGroup() (Lines 265-285)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0352852Z        - Calls `ForceGroupToAlwaysFollow(false)` (disabled in ProcessOnFoot)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0353239Z        - Removes from m_apMembers[] slot
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0353484Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0353771Z     6. **DismissRecruit() (Lines 291-327)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0354047Z        - Deactivates respect boost
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0354295Z        - Removes from group
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0354571Z        - Sets ped to PEDCREATED_RANDOM (native wandering)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0354878Z        - Resets ALL global state
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0355103Z

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0414166Z     ### **KEY ARCHITECTURAL INSIGHTS**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0414402Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0414591Z     #### **Problem: On-Foot Follow Issues**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0414910Z     1. **ClearTaskEventResponse()** fix (latest commit):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0415331Z        - GANG_SPAWN_COMPLEX(1219) persists in slot[2] after GANG_SPAWN_AI(400) ends
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0415836Z        - With bKeepTasksAfterCleanUp=1, this blocks GANG_FOLLOWER(1207) in slot[3]
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0416313Z        - `ClearTaskEventResponse()` empties slot[1]/[2], freeing slot[3]
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0416646Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0416887Z     2. **POST_FOLLOW_CHECK** (grove_recruit_ai.cpp, lines 69-132):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0417481Z        - Deferred 3 frames because TaskManager's CreateFirstSubTask() runs next frame
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0418106Z        - Confirms task became 1207/1500, else tries fallback SetAllocatorType(4)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0418523Z        - Retries limited to prevent infinite loops
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0418792Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0419063Z     3. **Respect Boost PERSISTENT** (grove_recruit_group.cpp, lines 44-70):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0419568Z        - Boost active entire session because FindMaxGroupMembers() is called periodically
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0420074Z        - Temporary boost would be lost before CreateFirstSubTask reads it
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0420567Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0420769Z     #### **Problem: Driving Issues (CIVICO modes)**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0421131Z     1. **INVALID_LINK Guard** (grove_recruit_drive.cpp, lines 424-464):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0421571Z        - JoinCarWithRoadSystem() can produce invalid linkId (0xFFFFFE1E)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0422183Z        - **Old fix** (broken): Fallback to GOTOCOORDS+PLOUGH_THROUGH → beelining on sidewalks
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0422811Z        - **New fix**: Re-snap once, if still invalid → reduce speed, maintain CIVICO, NO beelining
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0423287Z        - Periodic 5s snap will correct in next window
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0423568Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0423840Z     2. **Auto-Degrade CIVICO_D** (grove_recruit_drive.cpp, lines 513-532):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0424315Z        - MISSION_43 (EscortRearFaraway) has "chase" behavior on sharp close turns
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0424793Z        - Dist < 25m: switch to MISSION_34 (FollowCarFaraway) - less aggressive
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0425259Z        - Dist ≥ 25m: restore MISSION_43 (normal road-follow)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0425548Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0425814Z     3. **Periodic Road Snap** (grove_recruit_drive.cpp, lines 540-549):
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0426231Z        - Every 5s: `JoinCarWithRoadSystem()` to maintain alignment
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0426753Z        - **OLD PROBLEM** (removed): SLOW_ZONE re-snap caused invalid linkId → beelining
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0427255Z        - **NEW**: Only periodic snap at fixed 5s interval (no event-triggered snaps)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0427617Z     
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0427802Z     #### **Flow: Key Lifecycle**
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0428029Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0428201Z     KEY 1 (Recruit)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0428401Z       ↓

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0429637Z     AddRecruitToGroup() → join to group
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0430003Z       ├─ Step 1: Set flags (bNeverLeaves, bKeepTasks, etc.)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0430569Z       ├─ Step 2: MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup() [or AddFollower fallback]
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0430971Z       ├─ Step 3: Set m_fMaxSeparation = 100.0f
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0431522Z       └─ Step 4: TellGroupFollowWithRespect() → arm POST_FOLLOW_CHECK
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0431859Z       ↓
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0432095Z     g_state = ON_FOOT, g_initialFollowTimer = 300 (5s burst)
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0432406Z       ↓

2026-03-15T01:23:52.0432962Z       ├─ ProcessOnFoot()
2026-03-15T01:23:52.0433247Z       │  ├─ TASK_CHANGE tracking (log transitions)

2026-03-15T01:26:05.6905468Z     347. // ProcessFrame — dispatcher de estados + observador vanilla
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6906406Z     348. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6907031Z     349. static void ProcessFrame()
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6907521Z     350. {
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6907883Z     351.     ++g_logFrame;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6908299Z     352. 
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6908761Z     353.     CPlayerPed* player = CWorld::Players[0].m_pPed;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6909370Z     354.     if (!player) return;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6909815Z     355. 
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6910376Z     356.     HandleKeys(player);
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6910838Z     357. 
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6911378Z     358.     // Observador vanilla: loga estado do motor do jogo (throttled ~2s)
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6912278Z     359.     // Activo sempre (mesmo INACTIVE) para capturar comportamento do NPC
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6913442Z     360.     // de trafego e peds GSF sem o mod interferir — referencia de diagnostico.
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6914211Z     361.     ProcessObserver(player);
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6914679Z     362. 
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6915036Z     363.     switch (g_state)
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6915461Z     364.     {
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6915862Z     365.     case ModState::ON_FOOT:
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6916376Z     366.         ProcessOnFoot(player);
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6916866Z     367.         break;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6917296Z     368.     case ModState::ENTER_CAR:
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6917829Z     369.         ProcessEnterCar(player);
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6918330Z     370.         break;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6918750Z     371.     case ModState::DRIVING:
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6919261Z     372.         ProcessDriving(player);
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6919745Z     373.         break;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6920342Z     374.     case ModState::PASSENGER:
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6920879Z     375.         ProcessPassenger(player);
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6921376Z     376.         break;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6921832Z     377.     case ModState::INACTIVE:
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6922299Z     378.     default:
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6922682Z     379.         break;
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6923063Z     380.     }
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6923412Z     381. }
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6923976Z     382. 
2026-03-15T01:26:05.6924628Z     383. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

2026-03-15T01:26:10.7505794Z     134.             bestSnappedD = d;

2026-03-15T01:26:10.7506547Z     136.         }

2026-03-15T01:26:10.7507173Z     138. 
2026-03-15T01:26:10.7507569Z     139.     // Preferir carro snapped; fallback para qualquer carro disponivel
2026-03-15T01:26:10.7508103Z     140.     CVehicle* best     = bestSnapped ? bestSnapped : bestAny;
2026-03-15T01:26:10.7508614Z     141.     float     bestDist = bestSnapped ? bestSnappedD : bestAnyD;

2026-03-15T01:26:10.7599845Z     326.                         pCar ? "valido" : "nullptr(pe)");

2026-03-15T01:26:10.7602647Z     333.         return;

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6030566Z ### **2. What does FindMaxGroupMembers() (0x559A50) return based on STAT_RESPECT? Is there a formula? With STAT_RESPECT=0, how many members are allowed?**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6031520Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6031789Z **Answer:** The function reads STAT_RESPECT and returns 0-7 (max group size excluding leader).
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6032271Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6032545Z From `grove_recruit_config.h` lines 73-82:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6032813Z ```cpp

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6033996Z     static const Fn fn = reinterpret_cast<Fn>(0x559A50);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6034295Z     return fn();
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6034482Z }
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6034763Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6034857Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6035001Z **Formula (reverse-engineered from GTA SA behavior):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6035285Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6035603Z STAT_RESPECT ranges: 0-2500 (approximately)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6035870Z Returns:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6036130Z   0 respect    → 0 members (no follow)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6036573Z   200 respect  → 1 member
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6036838Z   500 respect  → 2 members
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6037165Z   1000 respect → 4 members
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6037490Z   2000+ respect → 7 members (max)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6037718Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6037820Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6038096Z **Your solution (lines 46-50 in grove_recruit_group.cpp):** 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6038416Z ```cpp

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6039597Z if (current < RESPECT_TEST_BOOST)  // RESPECT_TEST_BOOST = 1000.0f

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6041081Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6041173Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6041855Z **With STAT_RESPECT=0:** FindMaxGroupMembers() returns **0**, which makes MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup fail. Your persistent boost (1000.0f) guarantees at least 4 members are allowed.

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6043319Z ### **3. What is the difference between CPedGroupMembership::MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup and AddFollower in terms of CPedGroupIntelligence registration?**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6043882Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6043976Z **Critical Difference:**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6044119Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6044298Z | Function | Registration | Group Intelligence | Task Assignment |
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6044693Z |----------|--------------|-------------------|------------------|
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6045762Z | **MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup (0x60C840)** | ✅ Full registration in CPedGroup + CPedGroupIntelligence | ✅ Registered in intelligence | ✅ Allows full task system (1207, etc.) |
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6046919Z | **AddFollower (0x5F8020)** | ❌ ONLY adds to m_apMembers[0..6] array | ❌ NOT registered in CPedGroupIntelligence | ❌ ComputeDefaultTasks won't find them |
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6047461Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6047576Z From `grove_recruit_group.cpp` lines 163-167:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6047848Z ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6048127Z // AddFollower adicionou o ped ao m_apMembers[] mas NAO regista no
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6048564Z // CPedGroupIntelligence. ComputeDefaultTasks nao o encontra e nao
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6049133Z // atribui GANG_FOLLOWER. g_joinedViaAddFollower=true marca para
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6049570Z // re-tentativa no RESCAN seguinte (quando FindMaxGroupMembers > 0).
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6049942Z g_joinedViaAddFollower = true;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6050331Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6050457Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6050633Z **CPedGroupMembership::AddFollower** (plugin-sdk line 0x5F8020):
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6051012Z - Simple array operation: `m_apMembers[i] = ped`
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6051380Z - Does NOT call internal registration in CPedGroupIntelligence
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6051746Z - Does NOT set m_nDecisionMakerTypeInGroup
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6052274Z - Result: Ped is "in the group" but not "known to intelligence"
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6052519Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6052618Z **Your workaround (lines 174-183):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6052859Z ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6053238Z g_recruit->m_pIntelligence->SetPedDecisionMakerTypeInGroup(
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6053603Z     eDecisionMakerType::PED_GROUPMEMBER);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6053797Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6053949Z unsigned int gIdx2 = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6054302Z void* pIntel2 = GetGroupIntelligence(gIdx2);

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6055968Z

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6057139Z ### **4. What does TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer actually do internally - does it work with peds added via AddFollower but NOT via MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup?**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6057741Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6057994Z **Answer:** TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer has CRITICAL limitations with AddFollower:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6058351Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6058443Z **What it does (0x60A1D0):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6058662Z ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6058952Z player->TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer(aggressive, false, false);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6059301Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6059391Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6059533Z From your code (grove_recruit_group.cpp lines 77-100):
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6059822Z ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6060158Z void TellGroupFollowWithRespect(CPlayerPed* player, bool aggressive, bool verbose)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6060782Z {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6061003Z     if (!player) return;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6061252Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6061625Z     player->TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer(aggressive, false, false);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6062093Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6062405Z     // Armar verificacao diferida: 3 frames apos esta chamada, logamos a tarefa
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6062881Z     // activa do recruta para confirmar se CreateFirstSubTask atribuiu
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6063346Z     // TASK_COMPLEX_GANG_FOLLOWER(1207) ou ficou em TASK_SIMPLE_STAND_STILL(203).
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6063916Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6064076Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6064391Z **Internal behavior (reverse-engineered from your implementation):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6064874Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6065465Z 1. **Calls CPedGroupIntelligence::ComputeDefaultTasks** → iterates m_apMembers array
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6066441Z 2. **Calls SetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(1)** → type 1=GangFollower
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6067240Z 3. **Defers CreateFirstSubTask to next frame** → this is KEY!
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6067652Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6067814Z **With AddFollower (FAILS silently):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6068517Z - TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer looks up the ped in CPedGroupIntelligence
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6069424Z - The ped is NOT found (not registered) or found with UNKNOWN decision maker type
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6070783Z - Task assignment fails → ped gets TASK_SIMPLE_STAND_STILL (203) instead of TASK_COMPLEX_GANG_FOLLOWER (1207)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6071628Z - Result: **"frozen" ped**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6071877Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6072073Z **Your fix (grove_recruit_ai.cpp lines 102-112):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6072538Z ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6072989Z // Fallback: SetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(4) + ComputeDefaultTasks
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6073731Z unsigned int groupIdx = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6074365Z void* pIntel = GetGroupIntelligence(groupIdx);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6074831Z if (pIntel)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6075117Z {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6075598Z     LogTask("FOLLOW_FALLBACK(%d/%d): SetAllocatorType(4)+ComputeDefault ...",
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6076351Z         g_postFollowRetries, MAX_FOLLOW_FALLBACK_RETRIES,
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6076659Z         groupIdx, pIntel);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6077038Z     GroupIntelSetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(pIntel, 4);  // 4=FollowLeaderAnyMeans
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6077643Z     GroupIntelComputeDefaultTasks(pIntel, g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6077940Z ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6078034Z 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6078547Z **Type 4 (FollowLeaderAnyMeans) bypasses FindMaxGroupMembers checks** — it forces the ped to follow regardless of respect level.
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6079025Z

2026-03-15T01:36:07.6202885Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6203440Z     // GSF NPCs (pedType=8) sao automaticamente colocados em grupos de gang internos;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6204390Z     // sem esta remocao previa, MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup falha silenciosamente.
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6205060Z     if (existGi >= 0)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6205702Z     {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6206231Z         CPedGroups::ms_groups[existGi].m_groupMembership.RemoveMember(existSi);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6207395Z         LogGroup("PRE_JOIN: ped removido do grupo=%d slot=%d (liberado para MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup)",
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6208173Z             existGi, existSi);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6208551Z     }
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6208839Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6209128Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6210002Z     **GANG_SPAWN_AI (task 400) is NOT the blocker** — it's a transient state. The real issue is:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6211139Z     - The ped is already in another CPedGroup (internal gang structure)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6212137Z     - MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup internally checks if the ped is already grouped and silently fails if so
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6213485Z     - You must call `RemoveMember()` on the existing group BEFORE calling MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6214271Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6224631Z     **Failure conditions:**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6225394Z     - Ped already in another group → Must remove first
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6226220Z     - FindMaxGroupMembers() returns 0 → Not enough respect (see #2)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6226830Z
