2026-03-15T01:36:07.6228424Z     ### **2. What does FindMaxGroupMembers() (0x559A50) return based on STAT_RESPECT? Is there a formula? With STAT_RESPECT=0, how many members are allowed?**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6229542Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6230392Z     **Answer:** The function reads STAT_RESPECT and returns 0-7 (max group size excluding leader).
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6231196Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6231579Z     From `grove_recruit_config.h` lines 73-82:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6232060Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6232412Z     inline int FindMaxGroupMembers()
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6232838Z     {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6233140Z         typedef int (__cdecl* Fn)();
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6233657Z         static const Fn fn = reinterpret_cast<Fn>(0x559A50);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6234187Z         return fn();
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6234506Z     }
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6234775Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6235047Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6235433Z     **Formula (reverse-engineered from GTA SA behavior):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6235957Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6236373Z     STAT_RESPECT ranges: 0-2500 (approximately)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6236838Z     Returns:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6237293Z       0 respect    → 0 members (no follow)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6237796Z       200 respect  → 1 member
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6238267Z       500 respect  → 2 members
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6238710Z       1000 respect → 4 members
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6239169Z       2000+ respect → 7 members (max)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6239574Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6239854Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6240439Z     **Your solution (lines 46-50 in grove_recruit_group.cpp):** 
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6241138Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6241579Z     // RESPECT_BOOST: boost PERSISTENTE durante TODA a sessao
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6242247Z     float current = CStats::GetStatValue(STAT_RESPECT);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6242910Z     if (current < RESPECT_TEST_BOOST)  // RESPECT_TEST_BOOST = 1000.0f
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6243473Z     {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6243792Z         g_savedRespect = current;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6244323Z         CStats::SetStatValue(STAT_RESPECT, RESPECT_TEST_BOOST);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6244920Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6245240Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6246400Z     **With STAT_RESPECT=0:** FindMaxGroupMembers() returns **0**, which makes MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup fail. Your persistent boost (1000.0f) guarantees at least 4 members are allowed.
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6247672Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6247949Z     ---
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6248224Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6249234Z     ### **3. What is the difference between CPedGroupMembership::MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup and AddFollower in terms of CPedGroupIntelligence registration?**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6250617Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6250952Z     **Critical Difference:**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6251615Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6252078Z     | Function | Registration | Group Intelligence | Task Assignment |
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6252784Z     |----------|--------------|-------------------|------------------|
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6254394Z     | **MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup (0x60C840)** | ✅ Full registration in CPedGroup + CPedGroupIntelligence | ✅ Registered in intelligence | ✅ Allows full task system (1207, etc.) |
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6255643Z     | **AddFollower (0x5F8020)** | ❌ ONLY adds to m_apMembers[0..6] array | ❌ NOT registered in CPedGroupIntelligence | ❌ ComputeDefaultTasks won't find them |
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6256254Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6256470Z     From `grove_recruit_group.cpp` lines 163-167:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6256751Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6257039Z     // AddFollower adicionou o ped ao m_apMembers[] mas NAO regista no
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6257493Z     // CPedGroupIntelligence. ComputeDefaultTasks nao o encontra e nao
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6257952Z     // atribui GANG_FOLLOWER. g_joinedViaAddFollower=true marca para
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6258395Z     // re-tentativa no RESCAN seguinte (quando FindMaxGroupMembers > 0).
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6258761Z     g_joinedViaAddFollower = true;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6259013Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6259178Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6259452Z     **CPedGroupMembership::AddFollower** (plugin-sdk line 0x5F8020):
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6259847Z     - Simple array operation: `m_apMembers[i] = ped`
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6260526Z     - Does NOT call internal registration in CPedGroupIntelligence
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6260940Z     - Does NOT set m_nDecisionMakerTypeInGroup
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6261594Z     - Result: Ped is "in the group" but not "known to intelligence"
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6262122Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6262434Z     **Your workaround (lines 174-183):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6262860Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6263325Z     g_recruit->m_pIntelligence->SetPedDecisionMakerTypeInGroup(
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6263976Z         eDecisionMakerType::PED_GROUPMEMBER);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6264429Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6264845Z     unsigned int gIdx2 = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6265474Z     void* pIntel2 = GetGroupIntelligence(gIdx2);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6265953Z     if (pIntel2)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6266249Z     {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6266773Z         GroupIntelSetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(pIntel2, 1);  // 1=GangFollower
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6267580Z         GroupIntelComputeDefaultTasks(pIntel2, g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6268106Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6268376Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6268806Z     This manually registers the ped with the group intelligence.
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6269364Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6269633Z     ---
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6269905Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6271160Z     ### **4. What does TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer actually do internally - does it work with peds added via AddFollower but NOT via MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup?**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6272355Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6272967Z     **Answer:** TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer has CRITICAL limitations with AddFollower:
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6273720Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6274015Z     **What it does (0x60A1D0):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6274398Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6274916Z     player->TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer(aggressive, false, false);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6275540Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6275796Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6276181Z     From your code (grove_recruit_group.cpp lines 77-100):
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6276692Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6277300Z     void TellGroupFollowWithRespect(CPlayerPed* player, bool aggressive, bool verbose)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6278032Z     {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6278325Z         if (!player) return;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6278698Z         
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6279208Z         player->TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer(aggressive, false, false);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6279845Z         
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6280501Z         // Armar verificacao diferida: 3 frames apos esta chamada, logamos a tarefa
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6281564Z         // activa do recruta para confirmar se CreateFirstSubTask atribuiu
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6282398Z         // TASK_COMPLEX_GANG_FOLLOWER(1207) ou ficou em TASK_SIMPLE_STAND_STILL(203).
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6283195Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6283474Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6283952Z     **Internal behavior (reverse-engineered from your implementation):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6284566Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6285322Z     1. **Calls CPedGroupIntelligence::ComputeDefaultTasks** → iterates m_apMembers array
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6286243Z     2. **Calls SetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(1)** → type 1=GangFollower
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6286717Z     3. **Defers CreateFirstSubTask to next frame** → this is KEY!
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6287033Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6287223Z     **With AddFollower (FAILS silently):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6287633Z     - TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer looks up the ped in CPedGroupIntelligence
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6288165Z     - The ped is NOT found (not registered) or found with UNKNOWN decision maker type
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6288866Z     - Task assignment fails → ped gets TASK_SIMPLE_STAND_STILL (203) instead of TASK_COMPLEX_GANG_FOLLOWER (1207)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6289375Z     - Result: **"frozen" ped**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6289600Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6289814Z     **Your fix (grove_recruit_ai.cpp lines 102-112):**
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6290095Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6290711Z     // Fallback: SetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(4) + ComputeDefaultTasks
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6291167Z     unsigned int groupIdx = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6291553Z     void* pIntel = GetGroupIntelligence(groupIdx);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6291881Z     if (pIntel)
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6292196Z     {
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6292497Z         LogTask("FOLLOW_FALLBACK(%d/%d): SetAllocatorType(4)+ComputeDefault ...",
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6293092Z             g_postFollowRetries, MAX_FOLLOW_FALLBACK_RETRIES,
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6293419Z             groupIdx, pIntel);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6293969Z         GroupIntelSetDefaultTaskAllocatorType(pIntel, 4);  // 4=FollowLeaderAnyMeans
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6294515Z         GroupIntelComputeDefaultTasks(pIntel, g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6294938Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6295105Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6295865Z     **Type 4 (FollowLeaderAnyMeans) bypasses FindMaxGroupMembers checks** — it forces the ped to follow regardless of respect level.
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6296576Z     
2026-03-15T01:36:07.6296744Z     ---

2026-03-15T01:36:35.8580612Z     106. CVehicle* FindNearestFreeCar(CVector const& searchPos, CVehicle* excludePlayerCar)

2026-03-15T01:36:35.8584993Z     120.

2026-03-15T01:36:35.8585537Z     122. 
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8585726Z     123.         // Passe "qualquer"
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8585976Z     124.         if (d < bestAnyD)
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8586366Z     125.         {
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8586572Z     126.             bestAnyD = d;
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8586811Z     127.             bestAny  = veh;

2026-03-15T01:36:35.8588756Z     132.         if (linkId <= MAX_VALID_LINK_ID && d < bestSnappedD)
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8589066Z     133.         {
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8589265Z     134.             bestSnappedD = d;
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8589632Z     135.             bestSnapped  = veh;

2026-03-15T01:36:35.8590390Z     138.

2026-03-15T01:36:35.8591118Z     140.     CVehicle* best     = bestSnapped ? bestSnapped : bestAny;
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8591522Z     141.     float     bestDist = bestSnapped ? bestSnappedD : bestAnyD;
2026-03-15T01:36:35.8591842Z     142.

2026-03-15T01:36:39.4477886Z     287. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4478256Z     288. void ProcessDrivingAI(CPlayerPed* player)
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4478552Z     289. {

2026-03-15T01:36:39.4478984Z     291. 
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4479171Z     292.     CVehicle*   veh       = g_car;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4479475Z     293.     CAutoPilot& ap        = veh->m_autoPilot;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4479805Z     294.     CVector     vPos      = veh->GetPosition();
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4480146Z     295.     CVector     playerPos = player->GetPosition();
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4480701Z     296.     float       dist      = Dist2D(vPos, playerPos);
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4480989Z     297. 
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4481328Z     298.     // ── ZONA STOP: recruta completamente parado ──────────────────

2026-03-15T01:36:39.4481912Z     300.     {

2026-03-15T01:36:39.4482823Z     303.         return;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4483023Z     304.     }
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4483197Z     305. 
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4483529Z     306.     // ── ZONA SLOW: recruta abranda + restaura missao CIVICO ──────
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4484063Z     307.     // A STOP zone pode ter sobrescrito mission=STOP_FOREVER(11).
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4484484Z     308.     // A SLOW zone restaura a missao CIVICO para que o road-follow
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4484906Z     309.     // retome assim que o carro sair da zona (dist > SLOW_ZONE_M).
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4485244Z     310.     if (dist < SLOW_ZONE_M)
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4485477Z     311.     {
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4485690Z     312.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed = SPEED_SLOW;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4485991Z     313.         if (IsCivicoMode(g_driveMode))
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4486254Z     314.         {
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4486538Z     315.             eCarMission expectedM = GetExpectedMission(g_driveMode);
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4486926Z     316.             if (ap.m_nCarMission != expectedM)
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4487210Z     317.             {
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4487537Z     318.                 CVehicle* pCar = player->bInVehicle ? player->m_pVehicle : nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4487947Z     319.                 if (!g_slowZoneRestoring)
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4488223Z     320.                 {
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4488548Z     321.                     LogDrive("SLOW_ZONE: dist=%.1fm missao_atual=%d->%s restaurada "
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4489039Z     322.                              "speed=%d targetCar=%s (road-follow retomara ao sair da zona)",
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4489458Z     323.                         dist, (int)ap.m_nCarMission,
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4489926Z     324.                         (expectedM == MISSION_43) ? "MISSION_43(EscortRear)" : "MISSION_34(FollowFaraway)",
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4490522Z     325.                         (int)SPEED_SLOW,
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4490837Z     326.                         pCar ? "valido" : "nullptr(pe)");
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4491171Z     327.                     g_slowZoneRestoring = true;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4491457Z     328.                 }
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4491705Z     329.                 ap.m_nCarMission = expectedM;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4492028Z     330.                 if (pCar) ap.m_pTargetCar = pCar;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4492302Z     331.             }
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4492494Z     332.         }
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4492718Z     333.         return;
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4492922Z     334.     }
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4493097Z     335. 
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4493364Z     336.     // Saiu da SLOW_ZONE (dist >= SLOW_ZONE_M): road-follow retomado.

2026-03-15T01:36:39.4498044Z     347.     }
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4498218Z     348. 
2026-03-15T01:36:39.4498548Z     349.     // ── Verificacao de offroad (throttled) ───────────────────────

2026-03-15T01:36:46.0173269Z     3. ## O que é o plugin-sdk
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0173644Z     4. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0174767Z     5. O [DK22Pac/plugin-sdk](https://github.com/DK22Pac/plugin-sdk) é um SDK C++ que expõe as classes internas do GTA SA como headers C++ compiláveis.  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0176773Z     6. Permite criar ficheiros `.asi` (DLLs injectadas pelo ASI Loader) que correm como código nativo dentro do processo do jogo, com acesso total às estruturas internas.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0177909Z     7. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0178211Z     8. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0178487Z     9. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0178946Z     10. ## Comparação directa: CLEO vs plugin-sdk
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0179407Z     11. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0179786Z     12. | Capacidade | CLEO (actual) | plugin-sdk (ASI) |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0180467Z     13. |---|---|---|
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0181304Z     14. | **Frequência de actualização** | ~300 ms (wait mínimo do loop) | Per-frame (~16 ms a 60 fps) |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0183212Z     15. | **Speed adaptativa para curvas** | ❌ Sem opcode para ler o multiplicador do link | ✅ `CCarCtrl::FindSpeedMultiplierWithSpeedFromNodes(m_nStraightLineDistance)` |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0185309Z     16. | **Detecção automática de offroad** | ⚠️ Só com guard 00EC + 04D3 (manual, 300 ms) | ✅ `CCarCtrl::FindNodesThisCarIsNearestTo` per-frame |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0187123Z     17. | **Alinhamento de faixa** | ⚠️ Só activo em DriveMode=Accurate (CIVICO-C) | ✅ `CCarCtrl::ClipTargetOrientationToLink` em qualquer modo |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0189067Z     18. | **Controlo de velocidade** | ⚠️ `00AD` (float arredondado, aplicado pelo CLEO) | ✅ `CAutoPilot::m_nCruiseSpeed` (char, escrita directa, precisa) |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0190740Z     19. | **Múltiplos recrutas** | ❌ 1 recruta (1 handle, 1 estado) | ✅ Até 7 via `PoolIterator<CPed>` |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0191910Z     20. | **Leitura de CarMission** | ❌ Sem opcode | ✅ `CAutoPilot::m_nCarMission` |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0193041Z     21. | **Detecção de highway** | ❌ Sem opcode | ✅ `CPathNode::m_bHighway` / `m_bNotHighway` |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0194129Z     22. | **Nível de tráfego do nó** | ❌ Sem opcode | ✅ `CPathNode::m_nTrafficLevel` |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0195421Z     23. | **Pathfinding completo** | ⚠️ 04D3 só o nó mais próximo | ✅ `CPathFind::DoPathSearch` (rota completa nó-a-nó) |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0196819Z     24. | **Coexistência com CLEO** | — | ✅ Corre em paralelo, sem conflito |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0197414Z     25.

2026-03-15T01:36:46.0201982Z     33. 0x14    m_nCurrentPathNodeInfo   CCarPathLinkAddress  Link actual (para ClipToLink e SpeedMult)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0202931Z     34. 0x27    m_nCurrentLane           char              Faixa actual
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0203866Z     35. 0x29    m_nCarDrivingStyle       eCarDrivingStyle  0=StopForCars, 2=AvoidCars, 3=PloughThrough, 4=SFI
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0205274Z     36. 0x2A    m_nCarMission            eCarMission       Missão actual (8=GotoCoords, 12=Accurate, 11=StopForever...)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0206412Z     37. 0x40    m_nCruiseSpeed           char              Velocidade de cruzeiro (escrita directa, ~km/h)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0207575Z     38. 0x4D    m_nStraightLineDistance  char              Distância em linha recta ao nó seguinte
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0208500Z     39. 0x5C    m_vecDestinationCoors    CVector           Destino actual da IA
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0209390Z     40. 0x8C    m_pTargetCar             CVehicle*         Carro-alvo (para EscortRear/FollowFar)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0210073Z     41. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0210566Z     42. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0211091Z     43. ### `eCarMission` — `plugin_sa/game_sa/eCarMission.h`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0211764Z     44. Missões relevantes para o nosso mod:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0212247Z     45. - `MISSION_NONE = 0`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0212857Z     46. - `MISSION_GOTOCOORDS = 8` — equivalente ao 00A7 do CLEO
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0213716Z     47. - `MISSION_GOTOCOORDS_ACCURATE = 12` — equivalente ao 02C2 do CLEO
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0214535Z     48. - `MISSION_STOP_FOREVER = 11` — parar completamente
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0215281Z     49. - `MISSION_34 = 52` — FollowCarFaraway (06E1 CIVICO-E)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0216036Z     50. - `MISSION_43 = 67` — EscortRearFaraway (06E1 CIVICO-D)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0216565Z     51. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0217097Z     52. ### `eCarDrivingStyle` — `plugin_sa/game_sa/CAutoPilot.h`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0217652Z     53. ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0218377Z     54. DRIVINGSTYLE_STOP_FOR_CARS              = 0   // pára para carros, respeita semáforos
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0219152Z     55. DRIVINGSTYLE_SLOW_DOWN_FOR_CARS         = 1
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0220077Z     56. DRIVINGSTYLE_AVOID_CARS                 = 2   // desvia, ignora semáforos (CIVICO-D/E/DIRETO)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0221156Z     57. DRIVINGSTYLE_PLOUGH_THROUGH             = 3   // ignora tudo (offroad)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0222370Z     58. DRIVINGSTYLE_STOP_FOR_CARS_IGNORE_LIGHTS= 4   // pára obstáculos, ignora semáforos (CIVICO-0/A/B/C/F)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0223164Z     59. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0223457Z     60. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0223946Z     61. ### `CCarCtrl` — `plugin_sa/game_sa/CCarCtrl.h`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0224441Z     62. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0225006Z     63. **`FindNodesThisCarIsNearestTo(CVehicle*, CNodeAddress&, CNodeAddress&)`**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0225942Z     64. Encontra os 2 nós de estrada mais próximos ao carro.  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0226847Z     65. Se o nó mais próximo está a >30 m → carro está fora de estrada (canal, montanha).  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0227627Z     66. CLEO não tem equivalente directo.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0228059Z     67. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0228898Z     68. **`ClipTargetOrientationToLink(CVehicle*, CCarPathLinkAddress, char lane, float* heading, float fwdX, float fwdY)`**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0230361Z     69. Ajusta `heading` para ser paralelo à faixa de estrada do link actual.  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0231704Z     70. Internamente activo só em `DriveMode=Accurate`. Via ASI aplicamos a qualquer modo.  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0232749Z     71. Resultado: recruta não corta curvas, mantém-se na faixa correcta.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0233353Z     72. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0234084Z     73. **`FindSpeedMultiplierWithSpeedFromNodes(char straightLineDist)`**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0235042Z     74. Lê o limite de velocidade do link para a curva actual.  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0235934Z     75. Retorna `float [0.0, 1.0]`: 1.0 = reta, <1.0 = curva (proporcional ao ângulo).  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0236850Z     76. Permite pre-abrandar antes da curva — impossível em CLEO.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0237417Z     77. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0237799Z     78. **`StopCarIfNodesAreInvalid(CVehicle*)`**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0238664Z     79. Para o carro imediatamente se os nós do seu AutoPilot estão inválidos.  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0239494Z     80. Útil como guard de segurança quando offroad.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0239977Z     81. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0241044Z     82. ### `CPathNode` — `plugin_sa/game_sa/CPathNode.h`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0241459Z     83. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0242007Z     84. m_bHighway          — nó de auto-estrada (permitir velocidades mais altas)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0242649Z     85. m_bNotHighway       — explicitamente não-highway
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0243159Z     86. m_nTrafficLevel     — densidade de tráfego [0-3]
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0243733Z     87. m_bWaterNode        — nó aquático (recruta nunca deve navegar aqui)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0244300Z     88. m_bDontWander       — nó que NPCs civis evitam
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0244789Z     89. m_nNumLinks         — número de ligações do nó
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0245128Z     90. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0245344Z     91. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0245914Z     92. ### `CPools` / `PoolIterator` — `plugin_sa/game_sa/CPools.h` + `shared/extensions/PoolIterator.h`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0246484Z     93. ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0246823Z     94. // Iterar todos os peds activos no jogo (range-based for):
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0247301Z     95. for (CPed* ped : *CPools::ms_pPedPool) {
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0247775Z     96.     // ped é garantidamente válido dentro do loop
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0248124Z     97. }
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0248330Z     98. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0248795Z     99. CLEO não tem equivalente: a varredura manual com `0A8D` é propensa a crashes.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0249174Z     100. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0249459Z     101. ### `CWorld::Players` — `plugin_sa/game_sa/CWorld.h`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0249755Z     102. ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0250050Z     103. CPlayerPed* player = CWorld::Players[0].m_pPed;  // jogador 0 (CJ)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0250544Z     104. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0250721Z     105. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0251005Z     106. ### `Events::gameProcessEvent` — `shared/Events.h`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0251294Z     107. ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0251503Z     108. Events::gameProcessEvent += []() {
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0251822Z     109.     // Corre a cada frame do game loop de SA (~60 fps)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0252195Z     110.     // Equivalente a estar dentro de CGame::Process()
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0252488Z     111. };
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0252654Z     112. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0252821Z     113. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0252988Z     114. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0253163Z     115. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0253400Z     116. ## O que o protótipo implementa
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0253649Z     117. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0253867Z     118. O ficheiro `grove_recruit_asi.cpp` demonstra:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0254142Z     119. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0254444Z     120. 1. **Detecção automática de offroad** (`DetectOffroad`)  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0254929Z     121.    - `FindNodesThisCarIsNearestTo` → nó mais próximo → distância  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0255355Z     122.    - Se >30 m: muda para `PloughThrough` + velocidade 60
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0255653Z     123. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0255891Z     124. 2. **Speed adaptativa para curvas** (`AdaptiveSpeed`)  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0256346Z     125.    - `FindSpeedMultiplierWithSpeedFromNodes(m_nStraightLineDistance)`  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0257004Z     126.    - Multiplica a velocidade base pelo factor da curva
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0257300Z     127. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0257757Z     128. 3. **Zona STOP/SLOW per-frame** (`ProcessRecrutaFrame`)  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0258139Z     129.    - Escreve `m_nCruiseSpeed = 0` quando dist < 6 m  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0258496Z     130.    - Escreve `m_nCruiseSpeed = 12` quando dist < 10 m  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0258862Z     131.    - CLEO faz isto a 300 ms; ASI faz per-frame (16 ms)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0259149Z     132. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0259387Z     133. 4. **Alinhamento de faixa** (`GetLaneAlignedHeading`)  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0259856Z     134.    - `ClipTargetOrientationToLink` → heading alinhado à faixa  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0260504Z     135.    - Por implementar (v2): aplicar ao steering do veículo directamente
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0260855Z     136. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0261111Z     137. 5. **Multi-recruta via PoolIterator** (`ScanPlayerGroup`)  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0261473Z     138.    - Itera `CPools::ms_pPedPool`  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0261821Z     139.    - Filtra `m_nPedType == 7` (GANG1) + `bInVehicle` + proximidade  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0262247Z     140.    - Gere até 7 recrutas em simultâneo
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0262505Z     141. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0262670Z     142. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0262841Z     143. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0263089Z     144. ## O que falta para versão completa (v2)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0263358Z     145. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0263620Z     146. 1. **Comunicação bidirecional CLEO ↔ ASI**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0264418Z     147.    Usar `0A8C` (write_memory) no CLEO para escrever flags numa zona de memória partilhada que o ASI lê. Ex: flag do modo activo (29@) → ASI adapta a sua lógica.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0265037Z     148. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0265321Z     149. 2. **Aplicar heading de ClipTargetOrientationToLink ao steering**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0265848Z     150.    Requer hook em `CAutomobile::ProcessControl` ou escrita directa em `m_fSteerAngle`.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0266265Z     151. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0266659Z     152. 3. **Verificação de membership via `CPedGroupMembership::IsMember`**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0267247Z     153.    Em vez de apenas verificar `m_nPedType == 7`, verificar que o ped pertence ao grupo nativo do jogador.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0267701Z     154. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0267983Z     155. 4. **Detecção de highway → velocidade mais alta**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0268465Z     156.    Ler `CPathNode::m_bHighway` do nó actual → se highway, `SPEED_MAX = 80`.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0268865Z     157. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0269121Z     158. 5. **Pathfinding completo com `CPathFind::DoPathSearch`**  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0269664Z     159.    Calcular rota óptima nó-a-nó em vez de depender do 04D3 (nó mais próximo).
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0270034Z     160. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0270293Z     161. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0270470Z     162. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0270643Z     163. ## Como compilar
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0270857Z     164. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0271017Z     165. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0271192Z     166. Requisitos:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0271426Z     167.   - Windows com Visual Studio 2019/2022
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0271786Z     168.   - git clone https://github.com/DK22Pac/plugin-sdk.git
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0272096Z     169. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0272306Z     170. Visual Studio > Propriedades do Projecto:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0272621Z     171.   C/C++ > Additional Include Directories:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0272903Z     172.     $(plugin_sdk)\plugin_sa
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0273168Z     173.     $(plugin_sdk)\plugin_sa\game_sa
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0273432Z     174.     $(plugin_sdk)\shared
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0273681Z     175.     $(plugin_sdk)\shared\extensions
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0273924Z     176. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0274116Z     177.   Linker > Additional Dependencies:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0274399Z     178.     $(plugin_sdk)\output\plugin_sa.lib
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0274652Z     179. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0274894Z     180.   General > Configuration Type: Dynamic Library (.dll)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0275334Z     181. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0275565Z     182.   C/C++ > Preprocessor > Preprocessor Definitions:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0275854Z     183.     GTASA
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0276155Z     184.     _USE_MATH_DEFINES
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0276372Z     185. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0276727Z     186. Compilar → grove_recruit_asi.dll → renomear para grove_recruit_asi.asi
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0277213Z     187. Copiar para pasta do GTA SA (onde está o gta_sa.exe)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0277512Z     188. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0277688Z     189. Requer ASI Loader:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0277973Z     190.   https://github.com/ThirteenAG/Ultimate-ASI-Loader
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0278320Z     191.   (instalar como d3d8.dll ou usar ModLoader)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0278597Z     192. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0278765Z     193. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0278928Z     194. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0279107Z     195. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0279426Z     196. ## HÍBRIDO (CLEO + ASI) vs STANDALONE (ASI puro) — qual é melhor?
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0279761Z     197. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0279934Z     198. ### Resposta curta
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0280319Z     199. **Agora: híbrido (CLEO + ASI).  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0280608Z     200. A longo prazo: standalone ASI puro.**
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0280866Z     201. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0281029Z     202. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0281195Z     203. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0281506Z     204. ### Opção A — Híbrido: ASI ao lado do CLEO ✅ (recomendado agora)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0281823Z     205. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0282187Z     206. O ASI corre **em paralelo** com o `grove_recruit_follow.cs` sem substituí-lo.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0282554Z     207. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0282738Z     208. | Responsabilidade | Quem gere |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0282983Z     209. |---|---|
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0283243Z     210. | Teclas Y/U/G/H/N/B (recrutar, armar, etc.) | **CLEO** |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0283605Z     211. | Spawn do recruta, entrada no carro | **CLEO** |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0283998Z     212. | Modo de seguimento (tecla 4): CIVICO/DIRETO/PARADO | **CLEO** |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0284458Z     213. | Velocidade per-frame, offroad automático | **ASI** |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0284803Z     214. | Speed adaptativa para curvas | **ASI** |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0285112Z     215. | Alinhamento de faixa | **ASI** |
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0285356Z     216. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0285578Z     217. **Porquê é o melhor agora:**
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0286104Z     218. - O `grove_recruit_follow.cs` já funciona com a máquina de estados completa (8 modos, guards, etc.)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0286835Z     219. - O ASI apenas **refina** o que o CLEO não consegue fazer (per-frame, leitura de estruturas internas)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0287362Z     220. - Zero risco de quebrar o que já funciona
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0287808Z     221. - Não é preciso reescrever nada — instalas o `.asi` e fica logo melhor
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0288153Z     222. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0288373Z     223. **Conflito?** Não, porque:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0288731Z     224. - O ASI escreve `m_nCruiseSpeed` e `m_nCarDrivingStyle` a cada frame
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0289217Z     225. - O CLEO reescreve esses mesmos campos **apenas quando o modo muda** (tecla 4)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0289824Z     226. - Nos frames entre mudanças de modo (que são a maioria), o ASI afina continuamente
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0290336Z     227. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0290506Z     228. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0290676Z     229. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0291049Z     230. ### Opção B — Standalone: ASI substitui o CLEO inteiramente 🔮 (versão futura)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0291411Z     231. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0291735Z     232. Nesta opção o `.asi` faz **tudo**: teclas, spawn, IA, modos, guards.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0292068Z     233. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0292294Z     234. **Vantagens sobre o híbrido:**
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0292799Z     235. - Sem limitações do CLEO: teclas per-frame (sem wait 300ms), múltiplos recrutas nativamente
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0293450Z     236. - Sem necessidade de ter CLEO instalado (menos dependências para o utilizador final)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0294141Z     237. - Acesso a `CKeyboard`/`CControllerConfigManager` para input mais responsivo
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0294845Z     238. - `CPedGroupMembership::IsMember` para membership correcto (sem hack de `m_nPedType == 7`)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0295518Z     239. - Pathfinding completo com `CPathFind::DoPathSearch` para rota real nó-a-nó
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0304019Z     240. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0304391Z     241. **O que faltaria implementar (não trivial):**
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0304867Z     242. 1. Sistema de teclas: `GetAsyncKeyState` ou hook em `CControllerConfigManager`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0305534Z     243. 2. Spawn do recruta: `CCarGenerator` / `CPopulation::AddPed`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0306062Z     244. 3. Máquina de estados (8 modos, guards STOP/SLOW, 00EC offroad 50m)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0306477Z     245. 4. Dialog/texto de "Press Y to enter vehicle"
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0306794Z     246. 5. Sistema de armas: `GiveWeapon`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0307087Z     247. 6. Cleanup na morte/sair do carro
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0307334Z     248. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0307747Z     249. **Conclusão:** Possível e seria a solução mais limpa, mas é semanas de trabalho.  
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0308384Z     250. O híbrido permite chegar lá **iterativamente** sem reescrever tudo de uma vez.
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0308782Z     251. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0308955Z     252. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0309130Z     253. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0309358Z     254. ### Recomendação prática
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0309594Z     255. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0309759Z     256. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0310002Z     257. Fase 1 (agora): CLEO + ASI híbrido
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0310560Z     258.   grove_recruit_follow.cs  →  gestão de estados, input, spawn
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0311072Z     259.   grove_recruit_asi.asi    →  velocidade per-frame, offroad, curvas
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0311433Z     260. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0311689Z     261. Fase 2 (opcional): migrar estado por estado para o ASI
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0312164Z     262.   Começar pelo input (teclas) → depois spawn → depois modos
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0312614Z     263.   Cada migração desactiva a secção equivalente no CLEO
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0312914Z     264. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0313230Z     265. Fase 3 (versão final): standalone .asi puro, CLEO removido
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0313560Z     266. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0313730Z     267. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0313896Z     268. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0314067Z     269. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0314344Z     270. ## Coexistência CLEO + ASI (modo híbrido actual)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0314633Z     271. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0314954Z     272. O ASI **não substitui** o script CLEO — funciona **ao lado** dele:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0315286Z     273. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0315618Z     274. - **CLEO** gere: teclas Y/U/G/H/N/B, spawn, entrada no carro, estados, modo actual (29@)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0316146Z     275. - **ASI** gere: velocidade per-frame, offroad auto, alinhamento de faixa
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0316502Z     276. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0316738Z     277. Não há conflito porque:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0317078Z     278. - O ASI escreve apenas `m_nCruiseSpeed` e `m_nCarDrivingStyle`
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0317560Z     279. - O CLEO reescreve estes campos quando o modo muda (tecla 4), sobrepondo-se
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0318060Z     280. - Entre mudanças de modo, o ASI afina continuamente
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0318363Z     281. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0318530Z     282. ---
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0318704Z     283. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0318887Z     284. ## Diagrama de fluxo do ASI
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0319132Z     285. 
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0319295Z     286. ```
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0319594Z     287. [Events::gameProcessEvent] → a cada frame (~60fps)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0319907Z     288.   │
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0320162Z     289.   ├─ [60 frames] → ScanPlayerGroup()
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0320701Z     290.   │    └─ PoolIterator → encontrar peds GANG1 em veículo próximo
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0321111Z     291.   │         └─ preencher g_recrutas[0..6]
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0321588Z     292.   │
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0321874Z     293.   └─ [cada frame] → para cada recruta em g_recrutas:
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0322297Z     294.        ├─ dist < 6m  → CruiseSpeed=0, MISSION_STOP_FOREVER
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0322866Z     295.        ├─ dist < 10m → CruiseSpeed=12 (SLOW)
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0323220Z     296.        ├─ [30 frames] → DetectOffroad()
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0323607Z     297.        │    └─ FindNodesThisCarIsNearestTo → dist > 30m?
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0324044Z     298.        │         ├─ offroad=true  → CruiseSpeed=60, PloughThrough
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0324496Z     299.        │         └─ offroad=false → AdaptiveSpeed() + AvoidCars
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0324939Z     300.        │                └─ FindSpeedMultiplierWithSpeedFromNodes
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0325390Z     301.        └─ se missão Accurate → GetLaneAlignedHeading()
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0325836Z     302.             └─ ClipTargetOrientationToLink → heading da faixa
2026-03-15T01:36:46.0326149Z     303. ```

2026-03-15T01:37:10.2206497Z ## **ROOT CAUSE: Why Recruit Goes Off-Road When Close**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2206711Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2206862Z Your diagnosis is **partially correct**. The issue is:
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2207091Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2207262Z 1. **MISSION_43 (EscortRearFaraway) behavior when close (<25m):**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2207709Z    - Not a "switch to beeline" - it switches to **direct heading-copy** mode
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2208293Z    - The NPC tries to maintain exact heading of target vehicle
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2208719Z    - This forces aggressive turns that **cut through sidewalks/offroad**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2209002Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2209093Z 2. **Your fix is correct:**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2209411Z    - Degrading to MISSION_34 (<25m) reduces this aggressive behavior
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2209814Z    - MISSION_34 maintains distance instead of copying heading
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2210048Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2210391Z 3. **Additional issues in your code (potential refinements):**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2211151Z    - Lines 415-464: **INVALID_LINK guard** - when linkId is corrupt, the vehicle still uses CIVICO but at reduced speed (SPEED_SLOW). This might still cause off-road behavior.
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2212068Z    - The periodic `JoinCarWithRoadSystem()` snap (line 544) helps, but might be too infrequent for extreme turns
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2212485Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2212553Z ---
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2212652Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2212736Z ## **Recommendations**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2212877Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2213146Z 1. **Your MISSION_43→MISSION_34 transition is good**, but consider:
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2213699Z    - Making the threshold dynamic: `MEDIUM_DIST_M = 25.0f` could be reduced to `15-20m` for earlier switching
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2214272Z    - Testing if MISSION_34 still causes issues at very close range (<10m)
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2214591Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2214696Z 2. **For off-road behavior in SLOW_ZONE:**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2215373Z    - The code removes road-snap in SLOW_ZONE (line 337) to prevent INVALID_LINK
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2215910Z    - Consider keeping `DRIVINGSTYLE_STOP_FOR_CARS` but add extra guards
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2216187Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2216299Z 3. **Monitor the physical speed calculation:**
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2216690Z    - Line 567 shows: `physSpeedWD = veh->m_vecMoveSpeed.Magnitude() * 180.0f`
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2217367Z    - This 180x multiplier converts internal units to approximate km/h
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2218137Z    - Your `m_nCruiseSpeed` (0-255) is a different scale than actual movement
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2218835Z 
2026-03-15T01:37:10.2220482Z Your mod's implementation is **quite sophisticated** - you've already identified and partially fixed this issue. The remaining off-road behavior likely comes from the aggressive curve handling of MISSION_43 before the <25m threshold is hit.

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3723816Z     100. }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3723986Z     101. 
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3724322Z     102. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3724650Z     103. // AddRecruitToGroup
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3724940Z     104. // Sequencia completa de entrada no grupo + follow.
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3725326Z     105. // Equivalente ao bloco CLEO (0631 + 087F + 0961 + 06F0 + 0850).
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3725816Z     106. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3726173Z     107. void AddRecruitToGroup(CPlayerPed* player)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3726452Z     108. {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3726656Z     109.     if (!player || !g_recruit) return;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3727056Z     110. 
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3727385Z     111.     // ── Passo 1: Flags ANTES de entrar no grupo ──────────────────
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3727898Z     112.     g_recruit->bNeverLeavesGroup                  = 1;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3728272Z     113.     g_recruit->bKeepTasksAfterCleanUp             = 1;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3728649Z     114.     g_recruit->bDoesntListenToPlayerGroupCommands = 0;

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3729730Z     117.     unsigned int groupIdx = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3730088Z     118.     if (groupIdx < 8u)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3730427Z     119.     {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3730678Z     120.         int slotBefore = FindRecruitMemberID(player);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3730990Z     121.         if (slotBefore < 0)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3731226Z     122.         {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3731564Z     123.             // PRE_JOIN: diagnostico — o ped ja esta noutro grupo?

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3732135Z     125.                 int existGi = -1, existSi = -1;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3732473Z     126.                 for (int gi = 0; gi < 8 && existGi < 0; ++gi)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3732810Z     127.                     for (int si = 0; si < 7; ++si)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3733258Z     128.                         if (CPedGroups::ms_groups[gi].m_groupMembership.m_apMembers[si] == g_recruit)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3733731Z     129.                         { existGi = gi; existSi = si; break; }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3734022Z     130. 
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3734249Z     131.                 int maxMem = FindMaxGroupMembers();
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3734612Z     132.                 float resp  = CStats::GetStatValue(STAT_RESPECT);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3735149Z     133.                 LogGroup("PRE_JOIN: ped_em_grupo=%d(slot=%d) FindMaxGroupMembers=%d respect=%.0f playerGrp=%u "
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3735624Z     134.                          "(%s)",
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3735929Z     135.                     existGi, existSi, maxMem, resp, groupIdx,
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3736531Z     136.                     existGi >= 0 ? "ATENCAO: ped JA tem grupo — removendo antes de MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup" :
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3737086Z     137.                                    "ped sem grupo (OK para MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup)");
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3737443Z     138. 
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3737797Z     139.                 // Remove do grupo existente para que MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup possa aceitar o ped.
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3738390Z     140.                 // GSF NPCs (pedType=8) sao automaticamente colocados em grupos de gang internos;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3738963Z     141.                 // sem esta remocao previa, MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup falha silenciosamente.
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3739382Z     142.                 if (existGi >= 0)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3739632Z     143.                 {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3740010Z     144.                     CPedGroups::ms_groups[existGi].m_groupMembership.RemoveMember(existSi);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3740755Z     145.                     LogGroup("PRE_JOIN: ped removido do grupo=%d slot=%d (liberado para MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup)",
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3741253Z     146.                         existGi, existSi);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3741521Z     147.                 }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3741727Z     148.             }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3741929Z     149. 
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3742172Z     150.             player->MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup(g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3742545Z     151.             int slotAfter = FindRecruitMemberID(player);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3742859Z     152.             if (slotAfter < 0)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3743099Z     153.             {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3743337Z     154.                 // Backup direto via AddFollower
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3743775Z     155.                 CPedGroups::ms_groups[groupIdx].m_groupMembership.AddFollower(g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3744371Z     156.                 slotAfter = FindRecruitMemberID(player);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3744690Z     157.                 if (slotAfter < 0)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3744941Z     158.                 {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3745897Z     159.                     LogWarn("AddRecruitToGroup: MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup E AddFollower falharam — recruta fora do grupo!");
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3746466Z     160.                 }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3746683Z     161.                 else
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3746899Z     162.                 {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3747233Z     163.                     // AddFollower adicionou o ped ao m_apMembers[] mas NAO regista no
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3747747Z     164.                     // CPedGroupIntelligence. ComputeDefaultTasks nao o encontra e nao
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3748258Z     165.                     // atribui GANG_FOLLOWER. g_joinedViaAddFollower=true marca para

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3751659Z     171.                     // Configura DM manualmente: AddFollower nao chama SetPedDecisionMakerTypeInGroup,
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3752260Z     172.                     // o que deixa m_nDecisionMakerTypeInGroup=UNKNOWN e faz CreateFirstSubTask
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3752806Z     173.                     // (chamado por TellGroupToStartFollowingPlayer) ser um no-op.
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3753308Z     174.                     g_recruit->m_pIntelligence->SetPedDecisionMakerTypeInGroup(
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3753933Z     175.                         eDecisionMakerType::PED_GROUPMEMBER);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3754382Z     176.                     // Forca o grupo a computar e aplicar a tarefa padrao imediatamente.
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3754876Z     177.                     unsigned int gIdx2 = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3755302Z     178.                     void* pIntel2 = GetGroupIntelligence(gIdx2);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3755632Z     179.                     if (pIntel2)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3755883Z     180.                     {

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3758250Z     184.                     }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3758468Z     185.                 }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3758676Z     186.             }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3758880Z     187.             else
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3759089Z     188.             {

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3761325Z     193.         }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3761616Z     194.         else if (g_joinedViaAddFollower && FindMaxGroupMembers() > 0)

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3766508Z     204.             CPedGroups::ms_groups[groupIdx].m_groupMembership.RemoveMember(slotBefore);

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3767366Z     206.             int slotRetry = FindRecruitMemberID(player);

2026-03-15T01:38:35.3791683Z     268.     player->ForceGroupToAlwaysFollow(false);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3792108Z     269.     LogGroup("RemoveRecruitFromGroup: ForceGroupToAlwaysFollow(false)");
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3792505Z     270.     if (!g_recruit) return;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3792791Z     271.     int id = FindRecruitMemberID(player);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3793073Z     272.     if (id >= 0)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3793281Z     273.     {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3793569Z     274.         unsigned int groupIdx = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3793938Z     275.         if (groupIdx < 8u)
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3794171Z     276.         {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3794494Z     277.             CPedGroups::ms_groups[groupIdx].m_groupMembership.RemoveMember(id);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3795063Z     278.             LogGroup("RemoveRecruitFromGroup: slot=%d removido do grupo %u", id, groupIdx);
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3795485Z     279.         }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3795667Z     280.     }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3795848Z     281.     else
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3796029Z     282.     {
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3796357Z     283.         LogGroup("RemoveRecruitFromGroup: recruta nao estava no grupo (slot=-1)");
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3796753Z     284.     }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3796923Z     285. }
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3797089Z     286. 
2026-03-15T01:38:35.3797415Z     287. // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

2026-03-15T01:41:16.3168174Z     201. }

2026-03-15T01:44:13.4405175Z     bool CPedGroupIntelligence::ShouldSetHighestPriorityEventAsCurrent() {

2026-03-15T01:44:13.4405850Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4406025Z         // No current event?
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4406258Z         if (!m_CurrentEvent) {
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4406487Z             return true;
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4406691Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4406861Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4407101Z         // Same type, but current can't be interrupted by it?

2026-03-15T01:44:13.4408586Z                 return false;

2026-03-15T01:44:13.4409156Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4409376Z         // Event with higher priority takes precedence
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4409853Z         return m_HighestPriorityEvent->BaseEventTakesPriorityOverBaseEvent(*m_CurrentEvent);
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4410390Z     }

2026-03-15T01:44:13.4428389Z     void CPedGroupIntelligence::ProcessIgnorePlayerGroup() {

2026-03-15T01:44:13.4429066Z             return;
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4429257Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4429444Z         if (m_CurrentEvent) {
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4429746Z             switch (m_CurrentEvent->GetEvent().GetEventType()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4430068Z             case EVENT_LEADER_ENTRY_EXIT:
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4430519Z             case EVENT_LEADER_ENTERED_CAR_AS_DRIVER:
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4430798Z                 return;
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4430999Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4431173Z         }

2026-03-15T01:44:13.4432050Z                 return;
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4432243Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4432510Z             const auto src = m_CurrentEvent->GetEvent().GetSourceEntity();
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4432877Z             if (!src || !src->GetIsTypePed()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4433138Z                 return;
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4433329Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4433548Z             const auto grp = src->AsPed()->GetGroup();
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4433934Z             if (!grp || grp->GetMembership().GetLeader() != FindPlayerPed()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4434274Z                 return;
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4434470Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4434640Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4434860Z         delete std::exchange(m_CurrentEvent, nullptr);
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4435272Z         delete std::exchange(m_EventResponseTaskAllocator, nullptr);
2026-03-15T01:44:13.4435647Z         FlushTasks(m_PedTaskPairs, nullptr);

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2451804Z                 return task;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2452160Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2452453Z         }

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2475121Z     // 0x681920
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2475573Z     void CTaskManager::SetNextSubTask(CTaskComplex* ofTask) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2476114Z         if (!ofTask) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2476443Z             return;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2476751Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2477025Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2477328Z         assert(ofTask->IsComplex());
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2477740Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2478143Z         for (auto task = ofTask; task; task = task->GetParent()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2478829Z             if (const auto next = task->CreateNextSubTask(m_pPed)) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2479405Z                 task->SetSubTask(next);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2479852Z                 AddSubTasks(next);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2480446Z                 return;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2480781Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2481069Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2481473Z             // If no subtask is created, the `task` is considered done.
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2482136Z             // So we go to it's parent and create it's next subtask.
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2482869Z             task->SetSubTask(nullptr); // This also deletes the previous sub-task
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2483495Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2483772Z     }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2484039Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2484307Z     // 0x681970
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2484714Z     CTask* CTaskManager::GetLastTaskOf(CTask* task) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2485222Z         auto last{task};
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2485612Z         for (; task; task = task->GetSubTask())
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2486068Z             last = task;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2486418Z         return last;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2486738Z     }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2487005Z

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2489215Z                 primaryTask->StopTimer(event);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2489658Z             }

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2490900Z     // 0x681A30
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2491283Z     void CTaskManager::AddSubTasks(CTask* toTask) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2491772Z         if (!toTask) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2492102Z             return;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2492403Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2492677Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2493034Z         for (auto task = toTask; !task->IsSimple();) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2493579Z             const auto ctask = task->AsComplex();
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2494871Z             assert(GetTaskPool()->IsObjectValid(task)); // Sometimes tasks seem to get deleted which causes pure virtual calls (because of destructcors setting the VMT to their's)
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2496147Z             if (const auto sub = ctask->CreateFirstSubTask(m_pPed)) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2496487Z                 ctask->SetSubTask(sub);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2496818Z                 task = sub; // Go on creating the subtask of the created task
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2497202Z             } else { // No sub task created, so we can stop here
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2497552Z                 if (const auto parent = ctask->GetParent()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2497863Z                     SetNextSubTask(parent);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2498123Z                 }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2498309Z                 break;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2498679Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2498855Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2499022Z     }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2499183Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2499349Z     // 0x681A80
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2499629Z     void CTaskManager::ParentsControlChildren(CTask* parent) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2500123Z         for (auto task = parent; task && !task->IsSimple();) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2500834Z             const auto ctask      = task->AsComplex();
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2501162Z             const auto oldSubTask = ctask->GetSubTask();
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2501581Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2501831Z             const auto newSubTask = ctask->ControlSubTask(m_pPed);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2502143Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2502460Z             if (newSubTask != oldSubTask) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2502763Z                 oldSubTask->MakeAbortable(m_pPed);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2503164Z                 ctask->SetSubTask(newSubTask);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2503477Z                 AddSubTasks(newSubTask);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2503728Z                 return;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2504058Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2504236Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2504419Z             task = task->GetSubTask();
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2504708Z         }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2504957Z     }

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2505825Z     void CTaskManager::AbortFirstPrimaryTaskIn(std::initializer_list<ePrimaryTasks> slots, CPed* ped, eAbortPriority priority, const CEvent* event) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2506588Z         for (const auto slot : slots) {

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2507645Z                 break;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2507842Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2508070Z         }

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2508949Z     void CTaskManager::ClearTaskEventResponse() {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2509503Z         // Looking at the code, I think `nontemp` is only present if `temp` is, as it's not deleted otherwise.
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2510518Z         for (const auto idx : { TASK_PRIMARY_EVENT_RESPONSE_TEMP, TASK_PRIMARY_EVENT_RESPONSE_NONTEMP }) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2511024Z             if (auto& task = m_aPrimaryTasks[idx]) {

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2511713Z                 break;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2511924Z             }

2026-03-15T01:44:39.2512840Z     // 0x681C10
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2513218Z     void CTaskManager::ManageTasks() {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2513942Z         // Obviously this isn't how they did it, but, I wanted it to be readable...
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2514618Z         enum ProcessResult {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2515086Z             TT_FINISHED, //< The task tree has finished.
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2515689Z             TT_SUCCESS,  //< There's currently an active task.
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2516462Z             TT_ADVANCED  //< New sub-tasks were created, and there's currently an active task.
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2517156Z         };
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2517651Z         const auto ProcessTaskTree = [this](CTask* root, bool bIsPrimary) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2518317Z             ParentsControlChildren(root);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2518760Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2519092Z             auto lastTask = GetLastTaskOf(root);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2519543Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2520442Z             // The task tree can only be "terminated" with a `Simple` task. (Because a complex task must always have a sub-task)
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2521667Z             // If the last task is complex that means that creating all sub-tasks (See `AddSubTasks`) failed.
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2522641Z             // (Meaning that the task tree has finished and the root can be deleted)
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2523314Z             if (!lastTask->IsSimple()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2523978Z                 if (!bIsPrimary) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2524405Z                     return TT_FINISHED;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2524818Z                 }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2525128Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2525707Z                 // Try setting next sub-task
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2526232Z                 SetNextSubTask(lastTask->GetParent());
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2526684Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2527236Z                 // If setting the next sub-task above was successful then the last task has changed
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2527986Z                 lastTask = GetLastTaskOf(root);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2528436Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2528917Z                 // A complex task in this case means that the primary task has finished
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2529586Z                 if (lastTask->IsComplex()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2530049Z                     return TT_FINISHED;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2530620Z                 }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2530928Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2531236Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2531579Z             // Check if the simple task has finished
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2532150Z             if (!lastTask->AsSimple()->ProcessPed(m_pPed)) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2532675Z                 return TT_SUCCESS;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2533075Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2533377Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2533718Z             // It has, try creating the next sub-task
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2534250Z             SetNextSubTask(lastTask->GetParent());
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2534713Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2535206Z             // Check if the task tree has finished (See `SetNextSubTask` for more info)
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2535936Z             if (!root->GetSubTask()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2536410Z                 return TT_FINISHED;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2536855Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2537079Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2537299Z             // New sub-tasks were successfully created
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2537597Z             return TT_ADVANCED;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2537830Z         };
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2537999Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2538198Z         // Process active primary task's tree
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2538618Z         if (const auto activeTaskIdx = GetActiveTaskIndex(); activeTaskIdx != (size_t)-1) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2539119Z             auto*& activePrimaryTask = m_aPrimaryTasks[activeTaskIdx];
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2539442Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2539684Z             if (!GetLastTaskOf(activePrimaryTask)->IsSimple()) {
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2540081Z                 delete std::exchange(activePrimaryTask, nullptr);
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2540635Z                 return;
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2540847Z             }
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2541026Z     
2026-03-15T01:44:39.2541340Z             // The `10` here has no particular meaning, it's just an arbitrary iteration limit

2026-03-15T01:45:28.8753034Z - Internally calls `ChangeTaskInSlot(m_aPrimaryTasks[taskIndex], task)`
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8753519Z - `ChangeTaskInSlot` deletes old task, sets new one, and calls `AddSubTasks()`
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8754012Z - There's **no force parameter** - it always replaces the task in the slot
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8754301Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8754370Z ---
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8754466Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8754613Z ## 2. **What ComputeDefaultTasks @ 0x5F88D0 Actually Does**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8754848Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8754918Z ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8755198Z void CPedGroupIntelligence::ComputeDefaultTasks(CPed* ped) {
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8755563Z     FlushTasks(m_DefaultPedTaskPairs, ped);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8755943Z     m_DefaultTaskAllocator->AllocateDefaultTasks(m_pPedGroup, ped);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8756287Z }
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8756452Z ```
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8756543Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8756628Z **Parameters:**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8756924Z - `this` = CPedGroupIntelligence pointer (at CPedGroup offset +0x30)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8757304Z - `ped` = CPed* (can be nullptr = all members)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8757504Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8757581Z **What it does:**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8757985Z 1. Clears all default tasks from `m_DefaultPedTaskPairs` for the specified ped (or all if ped=nullptr)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8758608Z 2. Calls the active allocator's `AllocateDefaultTasks()` to assign new default tasks
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8759183Z 3. **Used after SetDefaultTaskAllocatorType to immediately apply tasks in the same frame**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8759537Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8759870Z **Critical:** This is the **key function for immediate gang follower assignment** without waiting for the next AI frame.
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8760513Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8760585Z ---
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8760687Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8760792Z ## 3. **CTaskAllocatorGangFollower**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8760981Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8761222Z No `CTaskAllocatorGangFollower` exists as a separate class. Instead, the system uses:
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8761563Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8761704Z - **CPedGroupDefaultTaskAllocator** (abstract base)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8762304Z   - **CPedGroupDefaultTaskAllocators::Get(ePedGroupDefaultTaskAllocatorType type)** - Returns the allocator instance
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8763031Z   - **Type 1 = GangFollower allocator** - Creates CTaskComplexGangFollower for each group member
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8763803Z   - **Type 4 = FollowLeaderAnyMeans allocator** - Bypasses respect checks (useful fallback)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8764146Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8764324Z ---

2026-03-15T01:45:28.8786703Z ## 5. **The Respect Boost Issue**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8786980Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8787232Z The code shows why **persistent respect boost** is essential:
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8787648Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8787765Z ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8788174Z // ComputeDefaultTasks is called NEXT FRAME by task manager
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8788860Z // But FindMaxGroupMembers() re-checks STAT_RESPECT every frame
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8789753Z // If temporary boost already restored → ped ejected from group
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8790014Z 
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8790405Z // SOLUTION: Persistent boost from spawn → dismiss
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8790752Z void ActivateRespectBoost() {
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8791070Z     float current = CStats::GetStatValue(STAT_RESPECT);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8791388Z     if (current < RESPECT_TEST_BOOST) {
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8791657Z         g_savedRespect = current;
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8791971Z         CStats::SetStatValue(STAT_RESPECT, RESPECT_TEST_BOOST);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8792281Z     }
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8792484Z }
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8792645Z ```

2026-03-15T01:45:28.8936294Z     **Parameters:**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8936858Z     - `this` = CPedGroupIntelligence pointer (at CPedGroup offset +0x30)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8937848Z     - `ped` = CPed* (can be nullptr = all members)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8938348Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8938651Z     **What it does:**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8939616Z     1. Clears all default tasks from `m_DefaultPedTaskPairs` for the specified ped (or all if ped=nullptr)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8941101Z     2. Calls the active allocator's `AllocateDefaultTasks()` to assign new default tasks
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8942198Z     3. **Used after SetDefaultTaskAllocatorType to immediately apply tasks in the same frame**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8943004Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8943808Z     **Critical:** This is the **key function for immediate gang follower assignment** without waiting for the next AI frame.
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8944727Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8945045Z     ---
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8945350Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8945711Z     ## 3. **CTaskAllocatorGangFollower**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8946182Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8946817Z     No `CTaskAllocatorGangFollower` exists as a separate class. Instead, the system uses:
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8947628Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8948081Z     - **CPedGroupDefaultTaskAllocator** (abstract base)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8949213Z       - **CPedGroupDefaultTaskAllocators::Get(ePedGroupDefaultTaskAllocatorType type)** - Returns the allocator instance
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8950745Z       - **Type 1 = GangFollower allocator** - Creates CTaskComplexGangFollower for each group member
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8951883Z       - **Type 4 = FollowLeaderAnyMeans allocator** - Bypasses respect checks (useful fallback)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8952654Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8952927Z     ---
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8953197Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8953698Z     ## 4. **THE CORRECT WAY: Equivalent to CLEO Opcode 0850 (as_actor follow_actor)**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8954340Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8954917Z     Your local code in `grove_recruit_group.cpp` shows the **correct implementation**:
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8955530Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8955846Z     ### **Method A: Via AddFollower (Fallback)**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8956140Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8956534Z     // When MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup fails (pedType=8 GSF NPCs):
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8957393Z     CPedGroups::ms_groups[groupIdx].m_groupMembership.AddFollower(g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8958063Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8958332Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8958888Z     **Problem:** Adds to m_apMembers[] but NOT to CPedGroupIntelligence's m_PedTaskPairs[]
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8959841Z     - **Solution:** Manually configure decision maker + force ComputeDefaultTasks:
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8960710Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8960978Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8961453Z     g_recruit->m_pIntelligence->SetPedDecisionMakerTypeInGroup(
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8962100Z         eDecisionMakerType::PED_GROUPMEMBER);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8962556Z         
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8963027Z     void* pIntel = GetGroupIntelligence(groupIdx);  // CPedGroup+0x30
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8963680Z     typedef void (__thiscall* Fn)(void*, int);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8964324Z     static const Fn fn = (Fn)0x5FBB70;  // SetDefaultTaskAllocatorType
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8964939Z     fn(pIntel, 1);  // 1=GangFollower
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8965344Z

2026-03-15T01:45:28.8966893Z     fn2(pIntel, g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8967263Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8967532Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8967930Z     ### **Method B: Via MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup (Preferred)**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8968454Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8968914Z     unsigned int groupIdx = player->m_pPlayerData->m_nPlayerGroup;
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8969510Z     if (groupIdx < 8u) {
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8969958Z         player->MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup(g_recruit);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8970600Z     }
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8970868Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8971123Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8971396Z     **Advantages:**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8972057Z     - Properly registers ped in CPedGroupIntelligence
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8972700Z     - SetPedDecisionMakerTypeInGroup called automatically
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8973344Z     - ComputeDefaultTasks called via group's AI process
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8974177Z     - **Still needs respect boost** if FindMaxGroupMembers() requires it
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8974776Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8975157Z     ### **Method C: Direct SetTask Assignment (Most Direct)**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8975667Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8975981Z     // Get the ped's task manager
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8976508Z     CTaskManager* tm = &g_recruit->m_pIntelligence->m_tasks;
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8977034Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8977339Z     // Create the gang follower task

2026-03-15T01:45:28.8978668Z         &CPedGroups::ms_groups[groupIdx],  // CPedGroup*
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8979215Z         g_recruit,                         // CPed*

2026-03-15T01:45:28.8980489Z         g_recruit->GetPosition(),          // CVector pos
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8981109Z         0.0f                               // float a6 (unknown)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8981489Z     );
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8981662Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8981869Z     // Set in primary slot (TASK_PRIMARY_DEFAULT)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8982241Z     typedef void (__thiscall* Fn)(CTaskManager*, CTask*, int, bool);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8982651Z     static const Fn fn = (Fn)0x681AF0;  // CTaskManager::SetTask
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8982996Z     fn(tm, task, TASK_PRIMARY_DEFAULT, false);

2026-03-15T01:45:28.8994706Z     ## 5. **The Respect Boost Issue**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8995056Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8995409Z     The code shows why **persistent respect boost** is essential:
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8995742Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8996043Z     ```cpp
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8996333Z     // ComputeDefaultTasks is called NEXT FRAME by task manager
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8996900Z     // But FindMaxGroupMembers() re-checks STAT_RESPECT every frame
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8997613Z     // If temporary boost already restored → ped ejected from group
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8998031Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8998318Z     // SOLUTION: Persistent boost from spawn → dismiss
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8998781Z     void ActivateRespectBoost() {
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8999108Z         float current = CStats::GetStatValue(STAT_RESPECT);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8999581Z         if (current < RESPECT_TEST_BOOST) {
2026-03-15T01:45:28.8999877Z             g_savedRespect = current;
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9000458Z             CStats::SetStatValue(STAT_RESPECT, RESPECT_TEST_BOOST);
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9000797Z         }
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9001077Z     }
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9001364Z     ```
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9001538Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9001707Z     ---

2026-03-15T01:45:28.9009692Z     ## **SUMMARY: The CORRECT Approach**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9010123Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9010754Z     **For most reliable CTaskComplexGangFollower assignment:**
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9011300Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9011707Z     1. **Set persistent respect boost** before adding to group
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9012542Z     2. **Use MakeThisPedJoinOurGroup()** - it handles CPedGroupIntelligence registration
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9013523Z     3. **Fall back to AddFollower + manual config** if step 2 fails (GSF NPCs, pedType=8)
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9014352Z     4. **Call ComputeDefaultTasks() immediately** after fallback
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9014971Z     5. **Keep boost active** until ped is dismissed
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9015769Z     6. **Call ClearTaskEventResponse()** if previous GANG_SPAWN_AI is blocking the follow task
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9016502Z     
2026-03-15T01:45:28.9018038Z     Your `grove_recruit_group.cpp` already implements all of this correctly. The key insight is that **you cannot directly assign CTaskComplexGangFollower and have it stick** - it must be managed through CPedGroupIntelligence's allocation system.

2026-03-15T01:45:40.2762397Z     288. void ProcessDrivingAI(CPlayerPed* player)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2762679Z     289. {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2762880Z     290.     if (!IsCarValid()) return;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2763121Z     291. 
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2763316Z     292.     CVehicle*   veh       = g_car;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2763610Z     293.     CAutoPilot& ap        = veh->m_autoPilot;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2763935Z     294.     CVector     vPos      = veh->GetPosition();
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2764274Z     295.     CVector     playerPos = player->GetPosition();
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2764628Z     296.     float       dist      = Dist2D(vPos, playerPos);
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2764919Z     297. 
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2765265Z     298.     // ── ZONA STOP: recruta completamente parado ──────────────────
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2765618Z     299.     if (dist < STOP_ZONE_M)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2765855Z     300.     {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2766051Z     301.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed = 0;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2766347Z     302.         ap.m_nCarMission  = MISSION_STOP_FOREVER;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2766642Z     303.         return;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2766842Z     304.     }
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2767017Z     305. 
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2767350Z     306.     // ── ZONA SLOW: recruta abranda + restaura missao CIVICO ──────
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2767784Z     307.     // A STOP zone pode ter sobrescrito mission=STOP_FOREVER(11).
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2768238Z     308.     // A SLOW zone restaura a missao CIVICO para que o road-follow
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2768657Z     309.     // retome assim que o carro sair da zona (dist > SLOW_ZONE_M).
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2769000Z     310.     if (dist < SLOW_ZONE_M)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2769243Z     311.     {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2769457Z     312.         ap.m_nCruiseSpeed = SPEED_SLOW;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2769754Z     313.         if (IsCivicoMode(g_driveMode))
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2770013Z     314.         {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2770494Z     315.             eCarMission expectedM = GetExpectedMission(g_driveMode);
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2771093Z     316.             if (ap.m_nCarMission != expectedM)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2771368Z     317.             {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2771692Z     318.                 CVehicle* pCar = player->bInVehicle ? player->m_pVehicle : nullptr;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2772297Z     319.                 if (!g_slowZoneRestoring)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2772664Z     320.                 {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2772993Z     321.                     LogDrive("SLOW_ZONE: dist=%.1fm missao_atual=%d->%s restaurada "
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2773631Z     322.                              "speed=%d targetCar=%s (road-follow retomara ao sair da zona)",
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2774057Z     323.                         dist, (int)ap.m_nCarMission,
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2774521Z     324.                         (expectedM == MISSION_43) ? "MISSION_43(EscortRear)" : "MISSION_34(FollowFaraway)",
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2774977Z     325.                         (int)SPEED_SLOW,
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2775293Z     326.                         pCar ? "valido" : "nullptr(pe)");
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2775634Z     327.                     g_slowZoneRestoring = true;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2775916Z     328.                 }
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2776161Z     329.                 ap.m_nCarMission = expectedM;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2776484Z     330.                 if (pCar) ap.m_pTargetCar = pCar;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2776763Z     331.             }
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2776960Z     332.         }
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2777150Z     333.         return;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2777351Z     334.     }
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2777532Z     335. 
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2777803Z     336.     // Saiu da SLOW_ZONE (dist >= SLOW_ZONE_M): road-follow retomado.
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2778263Z     337.     // NOTA: o re-snap via JoinCarWithRoadSystem foi REMOVIDO daqui porque
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2778769Z     338.     // produzia linkId invalido (0xFFFFFE1E) quando o carro estava numa posicao
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2779376Z     339.     // critica (interseccao, passeio, etc.) → activava o guard INVALID_LINK →
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2779827Z     340.     // recruta beelining no passeio por ate ~28 segundos.
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2780473Z     341.     // O snap periodico (ROAD_SNAP_INTERVAL=300fr) e suficiente para re-alinhar.
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2780891Z     342.     if (g_slowZoneRestoring)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2781134Z     343.     {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2781347Z     344.         g_slowZoneRestoring = false;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2781891Z     345.         LogDrive("SLOW_ZONE: saiu (dist=%.1fm) — road-follow retomado (snap periodico em %d frames)",
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2782407Z     346.             dist, ROAD_SNAP_INTERVAL - g_civicRoadSnapTimer);
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2782717Z     347.     }
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2782891Z     348. 
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2783220Z     349.     // ── Verificacao de offroad (throttled) ───────────────────────
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2783572Z     350.     if (g_offroadTimer <= 0)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2783807Z     351.     {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2784015Z     352.         bool wasOffroad = g_isOffroad;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2784330Z     353.         g_isOffroad     = DetectOffroad(veh);
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2784651Z     354.         g_offroadTimer  = OFFROAD_CHECK_INTERVAL;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2784959Z     355.         if (g_isOffroad != wasOffroad)
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2785221Z     356.         {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2785461Z     357.             LogDrive("Offroad: %s -> %s (modo=%s)",
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2785776Z     358.                 wasOffroad ? "SIM" : "NAO",
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2786075Z     359.                 g_isOffroad  ? "SIM" : "NAO",
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2786379Z     360.                 DriveModeName(g_driveMode));
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2786758Z     361.             // Ao entrar em offroad em modo CIVICO: snap imediato ao road-graph
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2787206Z     362.             // para tentar re-alinhar com a estrada (sem beelining).
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2787603Z     363.             if (g_isOffroad && IsCivicoMode(g_driveMode))
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2787904Z     364.             {
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2788305Z     365.                 CCarCtrl::JoinCarWithRoadSystem(veh);
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2788634Z     366.                 g_civicRoadSnapTimer = 0;
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2789352Z     367.                 LogDrive("OFFROAD_ENTER_SNAP: JoinCarWithRoadSystem ao detectar offroad (CIVICO — sem beelining)");
2026-03-15T01:45:40.2789849Z     368.             }

2026-03-15T01:45:40.2871087Z     561.         while (dH >  3.14159f) dH -= 6.28318f;
